description:
Hey, I'm Fatih – I've been in the ecom game for over 5 years now. We currently have an open spot for a video editor on our team. We're active in the German market and right now we're running ads for a baby product.

title: Compliance Specialist
description:
Position Overview



We are looking for a detail-oriented Compliance Specialist to ensure that company operations, client processes, and data handling practices align with applicable regulations and industry standards. This role focuses on maintaining compliance frameworks, documentation accuracy, and internal policy enforcement.



Key Responsibilities



-Ensure company compliance with relevant regulations including TCPA, GDPR, and insurance-related requirements.

-Draft and review contracts, data privacy policies, consent forms, and other compliance-related documents.

-Develop and maintain compliance documentation, audit records, and process guidelines.

-Conduct regular compliance audits and identify potential risks or gaps.

-Train internal teams on compliance standards and regulatory requirements.

-Monitor updates in regulations and recommend necessary policy adjustments.

-Collaborate with legal, operations, and management teams to enforce compliance standards.



Required Qualifications

-Background in regulatory compliance (TCPA, GDPR, insurance compliance, or related fields).

-Experience drafting contracts, privacy policies, and consent documentation.

-Strong documentation, auditing, and organizational skills.

-Ability to effectively train and communicate compliance requirements to tea
mbers.



Preferred Qualifications

-Legal or paralegal certification.

-Experience working with insurance agencies or regulated industries.

-Familiarity with US state-specific insurance regulations.

title: Architectural Drafter
description:
Company: 

Presidential Building Services Pty Ltd Location: Remote (work from home) Employment Type: Full-Time Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00am – 5:00pm (PST / AWST — Perth & Manila time) Start Date: Immediate



About Us

Presidential Building Services Pty Ltd is a well-established Perth-based construction company specialising in residential and commercial projects across Western Australia. We are a growing team committed to quality craftsmanship and delivering exceptional outcomes for our clients. We already have a growing remote team based in the Philippines and are now looking to expand with a talented and detail-oriented Architect or Architectural Drafter.



The Role

You will work closely with our Managing Director, Perth-based project teams, and our existing Philippines-based remote team to produce high-quality architectural drawings, plans, and documentation for a range of residential and commercial construction projects. This is a fully remote, full-time position supporting our Australian operations. We are looking for someone who can hit the ground running — this role is available for an immediate start.



Key Responsibilities

Prepare and produce detailed architectural drawings, floor plans, elevations, sections, and construction documentation

Develop concept designs through to construction-ready documentation for residential and commercial projects

Ensure all drawings comply with Australian building standards and relevant codes (NCC/BCA, AS standards)

Coordinate with project managers, builders, and trades to resolve design and documentation queries

Manage and update drawing registers and revision control

Assist with council and building permit documentation as required

Liaise with clients and consultants to incorporate feedback and design changes

Meet project deadlines and manage multiple projects simultaneously

Required Skills & Experience

Degree in Architecture or Architectural Drafting (or equivalent qualification)

Minimum 3 years' experience in residential and commercial architectural drafting or design

Proficiency in AutoCAD and/or Revit (ArchiCAD experience also valued)

Solid understanding of Australian building standards, the National Construction Code (NCC/BCA), and Western Australian planning requirements

Strong attention to detail and ability to produce accurate, construction-ready documentation

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a remote team environment

Reliable internet connection and a suitable home office setup

Availability to work Monday to Friday, 8:00am – 5:00pm (PST / AWST)



Preferred / Advantageous

Experience working with Australian construction companies or clients





What We Offer

Competitive salary (commensurate with experience)

Stable, long-term full-time remote position

Join an established and supportive remote team

Exposure to a diverse range of residential and commercial projects

Opportunity to grow with an established Australian construction business



How to Apply

Please send your CV, portfolio (including examples of residential and commercial projects), and a brief cover letter outlining your experience with Australian building standards

title: Influencer Outreach Specialist (Gifting Campaigns)
description:
We are a growing skincare brand looking for someone who has done influencer gifting before and knows how to do it well.



This is not an entry-level role. We want someone who has actually run gifting campaigns, built creator lists, sent products, followed up, and gotten results. If you have done this and can prove it, we want to hear from you.



What you will be doing:



You will be finding, vetting, and reaching out to influencers and content creators on TikTok and Instagram. You will manage the gifting process from start to finish, including outreach, shipping coordination, and follow-up. You will track who posted, what performed, and report results back to us.



What we are looking for:



Someone with real, hands-on experience running influencer gifting campaigns. You know what a good creator profile looks like. You know how to write outreach messages that actually get replies. You have managed shipping logistics for product seeding before. You are organized, self-directed, and do not need hand-holding.



How to apply:



Tell us exactly what you have done. We want specifics. What brands did you work with? How many creators did you contact? How many posted? What were the results? If you managed a gifting campaign, walk us through how you ran it.



Applications that do not include detailed experience will not be reviewed.

title: Acquisition Specialist (Real Estate)
description:
Acquisition Specialist (Real Estate Wholesaling)



Company: Homeward Partners

Location: Remote (Central Time)

Job Type: Full-Time | 44–48 hrs/week

Compensation: Base Pay + Commissions + Performance Bonuses



How to Apply

Please share a 1–2 minute video introduction in English talking about your background, communication experience, and why you’d be a great fit for this role.

Drop your WhatsApp as well for Quick Communication.



About Homeward Partners



Homeward Partners is a fast-growing real estate investment firm specializing in acquiring off-market residential properties directly from homeowners. Our mission is to create win-win solutions — helping sellers achieve peace of mind while building strong, ethical real estate deals that create value for everyone involved.



We buy distressed, inherited, pre-foreclosure, vacant, or problem properties — always focusing on transparency, empathy, and integrity.



As an Acquisition Specialist, you are the first or second voice sellers hear from us — the bridge between their challenges and our solutions.



Your Mission



Your job is to connect with motivated sellers, uncover their real needs, and help negotiate win-win purchase agreements for our company.

You’ll represent Homeward Partners with professionalism, empathy, and drive — moving conversations from first contact to signed contracts.



Key Responsibilities



Seller Outreach & Communication

Call, text, and
 inbound/outbound seller leads.

Build rapport and trust through active listening, not pressure tactics.

Qualify sellers based on motivation, timeline, property condition, and financial situation.

Ask diagnostic questions to uncover challenges like inheritance, title issues, or foreclosure risks.



Deal Analysis & Negotiation

Evaluate property values using tools like PropStream, Zillow, or Redfin.

Analyze motivation and market data to make fair, strategic offers.

Negotiate purchase agreements that align with company goals while maintaining win-win outcomes for sellers.

Submit qualified deals to the Disposition Team with all relevant details and comps.



CRM & Follow-Up Management

Maintain consistent CRM updates for every seller conversation, note, and offer.

Schedule timely follow-ups for unconverted leads.

Track and report KPIs such as calls made, quality conversations, offers presented, and contracts signed.



Team Collaboration

Coordinate with the Disposition Team to ensure deal handoffs are smooth.

Share feedback and insights from sellers to improve marketing and acquisition targeting.

Participate in sales meetings, training sessions, and roleplays to sharpen skills.



Tools You’ll Use

CRM: ReSimpli or Podio

Dialer: CallTools, Readymode, Mojo, BatchDialer

Property Data: PropStream, Zillow, Redfin, ChatGPT (for comps)

Communication: Google Workspace, Slack, WhatsApp

Tracking: Google Sheets, KPI dashboards



Qualifications

1–2 years of experience in real estate acquisitions, cold calling, or high-volume sales.

Excellent English communication skills (verbal and written).

Strong negotiation and problem-solving skills with a focus on empathy.

Organized, detail-oriented, and consistent with CRM documentation.

Comfortable working full-time U.S. hours (Central or Eastern Time).

Tech-savvy and able to learn new systems quickly.



Preferred Experience:

Prior experience talking to distressed or motivated sellers.

Understanding of real estate transactions, contracts, and title processes.

Familiarity with DISC personality profiles and rapport-based communication.



Compensation & Growth

Base hourly rate (DOE) + generous commissions per closed assignment

Performance-based bonuses

Paid training and continuous support

Clear promotion path to Senior Disposition Manager / Team Lead

Long-term opportunity with a fast-scaling U.S. investment firm

title: High-Performance Video Editor (AI UGC & SaaS)
description:
Job Opportunity: High-Performance Video Editor (AI UGC & SaaS)

Location: Philippines (Remote)

Role: Video Editor & Creative Strategist

Compensation:



Trial Phase: $50/week base salary + $20 per successful video submitted.

Full-Time Promotion: (After 20 videos successfully): $200/week base salary + performance bonuses based on ad results.



The Mission

We are looking for two elite video editors to join the MajiClip.ai team. MajiClip is a cutting-edge AI video and UGC creation tool designed for marketers and business owners. Your goal isn't just to "edit"—you are an engineer of attention. You will create high-converting "scroll-stoppers" that drive users to our platform by outperforming our top competitors.



The Requirements

- To be considered, every video you produce must meet these Strict Quality Guidelines:

- The 2-Second Rule: A massive, high-energy hook in the first 2 seconds. If it doesn’t stop the scroll, it doesn't count.

- Product Demonstration: You must use the MajiClip.ai software to screen-record and demonstrate specific features and benefits (how a user creates a video, the speed, the quality, etc.).

- Minimum Length: 20 seconds.

- Audio: Seamless background music and sound design are mandatory.

- Format: Optimized for social media (9:16 vertical).



Competitor Research

- We expect you to be a student of what works. You are required to use the
 Ads Library to research our competitors: Arcads.ai and Higgsfield.ai.

- Analyze their top-performing ads and reverse-engineer their hooks and pacing.



Advanced Task (Instant hire + bonus): Find the Higgsfield.ai video with the most views and recreate that exact "vibe" using MajiClip.ai features. If they use a "Problem/Solution" format, make our solution look faster and easier.



MajiClip.ai Creative Strategy Guide

I. High-Conversion Hook Templates (The First 2 Seconds)

- The "Anti-Competitor": "Stop overpaying for studios and videos. Here’s the secret..." (Visual: Split screen: High cost vs. MajiClip UI).

- The "Speed Freak": "I just created 10 viral ads in 60 seconds. Watch." (Visual: Fast-forward recording of the "Generate" button).

- The "Creator's Pain": "Stop filming yourself. Let AI do the UGC for you." (Visual: Tired creator vs. clean MajiClip output).

- The "Direct Benefit": "The easiest way to scale your Shopify store in 2026." (Visual: Dashboard showing high sales or sleek product shots).

- The "How-To": "How to turn a single link into a viral video." (Visual: Typing a URL into the MajiClip search bar).



II. Strategic Feature Angles

- Focus the body of your video on one of these specific "wins":

- URL to Video Magic: Show a user pasting a product link and getting a finished ad. Benefit: Zero effort.

- Faceless UGC Authority: Show the variety of AI avatars/real-person styles. Benefit: Professional UGC without the $500 creator fee.

- A/B Testing Machine: Demonstrate the "Bulk Create" or variation features. Benefit: Find winning ads 10x faster.



How to Apply (The Test)

- To qualify, you must submit a 20-second edited video demonstrating your skills.

- View the Style Template: 
 

- Access the Tracking Sheet: 

- Use the Tool: Go to MajiClip.ai. You will be given free credits to screen-record the platform.

- The Edit: Combine screen recordings with music, hooks, and captions. Do not just use the AI to generate a video and send it. 

IMPORTANT: We are hiring you for your editing—how you layer footage and sell the benefits.



The "MajiClip Standard" Checklist

- Visual Clarity: Is the software recording zoomed in (no tiny text)?

- Pacing: Is there a cut every 1.5 to 3 seconds?

- Call to Action: Does it end with a clear "Try MajiClip.ai for free"?

- Expectations: Minimum 5 videos per week (up to 7). Must be fluent in English and hit targets consistently.



Ready to build the future of AI marketing? Submit your 20-second test video and portfolio today!

title: WordPress SEO & Content VA (On-Page SEO + GEO Optimisation)

WordPress Management

Content & Blog Support

Basic SEO Tasks

Skills Required

• Good written English

• Attention to detail

• Ability to follow structured instructions

Bonus (not required but helpful):

Hours & Pay

Starting at 5–10 hours per week with the potential to increase.

We are looking for a long-term VA who can grow with the business.

Please include your hourly rate when applying.

How to Apply

- Research & Discovery: Monitor TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram to spot viral content, trending topics, and rising creators who align with our brand and audience.

- Outreach & Relationship Building: Initiate first contact with creators via
 or DMs, pitch collaboration opportunities, and manage ongoing communications.

- Negotiation: Handle terms of engagement, rates, and deliverables to secure partnerships that work for both the creator and our business.

- Handoff & Coordination: Once agreements are in place, pass selected creators to the internal team (or me) for collaborative content planning and production.



The ideal candidate is a fast-moving communicator with an eye for trends, understands creator culture, and is comfortable negotiating deals. You should be organized, persuasive, and motivated to build strong creator relationships that lead to impactful content.

We are scaling aggressively through paid social (Meta & TikTok), and creative is the core driver of our growth.

We need someone who:



Has strong experience creating high-converting image ads and video ads

Has experience working in fashion/streetwear/apparel

Works independently and manages their own time effectively

Develop multiple creative variations for testing

Work closely with our creative & marketing team

Maintain brand consistency across all outputs





Requirements

What We Offer

Performance-driven culture

 design work. We need to see a portfolio of
s you've actually designed — not landing pages, not social posts,

s directly in Figma, please do not apply. We need to see prior

Apply Today — Send Your Portfolio!!!



No portfolio, no interview. If your
s weren't made in Figma, please save us both the time.



We're looking for designers who are already great and want to work with brands that are actually worth designing for. If that's you, apply today and send us your best work. Let's talk.



IX Media — Let's build something worth opening.

title: Experienced Non-Fiction eBook Ghostwriter (Amazon KDP)
description:
Hello,



I am looking for a reliable ghostwriter who can create high-quality non-fiction eBooks for publishing on Amazon KDP.



With experience only. 

This is a long-term opportunity for the right person.

• Conduct research

• Deliver well-structured, easy-to-read content

• Follow the outline and instructions carefully

• Deliver completed manuscripts on time







Book Requirements



• Length: 20,000 - 30,000 words per book

• Format: Microsoft Word or Google Docs

• Clear chapters and headings

• Proper grammar and spelling





Content Rules



• Content must be 100% original

• No plagiarism

• Must pass Copyscape or plagiarism checks

• Content must follow Amazon KDP guidelines

• No copyrighted material

• No AI-generated spam or copied content







Rights



• The work will be considered ghostwritten

• All rights will belong to me

Payment

 1. A short introduction about yourself

 5. Your typical delivery time







 Important



I am looking for someone reliable, detail-oriented, and able to work long-term.



If you are interested, please send me a message with your writing samples and pricing.



Thank you!

title: Accounting Technician / Year-End Technician
description:
Location: Remote



Firm: Boutique Canadian CPA firm serving healthcare professionals, incorporated professionals, and owner-managed businesses



We are seeking an Accounting Technician / Year-End Technician to support year-end accounting and tax files. This role is more focused on CaseWare, compilations, T2s, T1s, and year-end file preparation, with lighter bookkeeping support as needed.



This is not a general virtual assistant role. We are looking for someone with a solid accounting foundation who can help prepare clean, organized files for accountant review.



Core Responsibilities



Prepare and maintain CaseWare working paper files



Assist with Compilation / Notice to Reader engagement files



Prepare or assist with T2 corporate tax returns



Prepare or assist with T1 personal tax returns



Perform year-end reconciliations, lead sheet support, and working paper cleanup



Support the accountant with adjusting entries, file organization, and follow-up items



Assist with light bookkeeping, cleanup work, and year-end catch-up projects as needed



Work on files for professional corporations, holdcos, and owner-managed businesses



Organize supporting documents and maintain clear workpaper notes



Flag missing information, discrepancies, and unresolved items for review



Ideal Background



Experience in a Canadian CPA firm or small/mid-size public accounting practice



Familiarity with CaseWare



Experience preparing or supporting compilation files



Exposure to T2 and T1 preparation



Strong Excel and bookkeeping fundamentals



Organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable working across multiple client files



Good written English and strong attention to detail



Nice to Have



Experience working with healthcare professionals and incorporated professionals



Exposure to GST/HST and year-end bookkeeping cleanup



Familiarity with tax and working paper software commonly used in Canadian firms



Experience supporting multiple related entities or corporate groups



Key Objective



We want someone who can support the accountant with clean, organized year-end files and assist with tax prep and compilation work efficiently and accurately.



Important Notes



This is a support role for a Canadian CPA firm



You will not be expected to provide tax advice or finalize returns independently



Final review, technical positions, and filing sign-off remain with the CPA



Accuracy, organization, and reliability are critical



How to Apply



Please include:



Your resume



A short summary of your year-end and tax-prep support experience



The software you have used, including CaseWare and tax software if applicable



Your Excel skill level



A brief example of a compilation, year-end file, or tax-prep support project you worked on



Your required monthly compensation



Your internet speed and backup internet/power setup



Please include the phrase “Clean files win” at the top of your application.

We are looking for a professional Medical Executive Assistant with a medical background to support a busy dermatology practice. You will manage daily clinic operations and must already know how to use specific medical software. We need someone who can step in immediately and keep the practice running smoothly.



What You Will Do:

Manage daily schedules and clinic office tasks

Lead and organize tasks to keep the practice running efficiently

What We Are Looking For:

Strong leadership skills and a Medical Virtual Assistant background

Highly organized and able to manage a fast-paced clinical environment

Please send the following:

-Your resume: A brief description of your experience with ModMed-EMA EMR and dermatology practices

-2–3 minute video introducing yourself so we can hear your English and communication style

title: Online English/World History Teachers (Near-Native Accent)
description:
bout Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, offering individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced near-native English-speaking online teachers with strong backgrounds in English and/or World History. Candidates may specialize in one subject (English or History) or be able to teach both. The ideal teachers will have experience working with young learners and be committed to creating a supportive and engaging online classroom.



Responsibilities

• Provide instruction in English and/or World History to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

• Utilize international-standard curricula.

• Create and deliver engaging lesson plans tailored to each student’s needs.

• Monitor and assess student progress, providing regular feedback to students and parents.

• Foster a positive and encouraging learning environment.



Qualifications

• Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12) and verifiable teaching certifications such as TESOL, TEFL, etc.

• Near-native English accent.

• Strong academic background in English and/or World History (additional experience in Science/Economics is a plus).

• Ability to work between 17:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 09:00–22:00 (Weekends) GMT+8.

• Experience teaching in public/international schools.

• Skilled at working with young learners aged 5–18

• Familiarity with ClassIn and digital literacy (Microsoft Suite and other educational platforms).

• Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10/Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits

• Flexible working hours.

• Opportunity to teach using internationally recognized curricula.

• Work with an international team of educators.

• Professional development and training opportunities.

• Regular enrollment system (not booking-based), ensuring a stable and consistent teaching schedule.

title: Instagram Cold DM Setter / VA for Fitness Coaching Business
description:
I am looking for a motivated, reliable, and skilled VA to help assist me with Instagram cold outreach for my fitness coaching business.



What you will be doing:

You will be sending 80–100 cold DMs per day to potential clients using my outreach framework and following up with leads consistently.



This role is not just about copying and pasting messages. I need someone who knows how to start natural conversations, keep them going, ask probing questions, build rapport, and help move the conversation in the right direction.



What I’m looking for:



Previous Instagram cold outreach / DM setting experience



Experience in the fitness industry or strong familiarity with fitness coaching offers, fitness clients, and the types of struggles they deal with



Experience with sending completely cold DM's with an end without ads organically



Strong understanding of how to identify quality prospective clients



Someone who is an excellent conversationalist and can make interactions feel natural, engaging, and genuine



Ability to ask the right follow-up and probing questions to keep conversations moving



Hardworking, dependable, and able to consistently meet daily outreach requirements



Strong written communication skills



Someone who can follow instruction, stay organized, and represent my brand well



Compensation:



$300/month base pay



Bonus structure with the opportunity to make $1,500+ per month



Bi-weekly pay via PayPal or Wise



To apply:

To demonstrate your seriousness, please apply with the word “FIT” at the top of your application.



I will not review your application if you do not include this.



Please also attach in your portfolio or application any previous Instagram DM cold outreach experience, especially anything related to the fitness industry, if applicable.



I’m looking for someone who can come in, learn quickly, connect with people well, and become a valuable part of the team.



I look forward to hearing from you soon.

title: Lead Generation & Marketing Outreach Assistant (Healthcare Transportation)
description:

We are seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Lead Generation and Marketing Outreach Assistant to help grow our Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT) company. The ideal candidate will research healthcare organizations that may need transportation services, organize lead information, and assist with outreach and marketing efforts to build professional partnerships.



This role will support business growth by identifying potential clients, maintaining organized lead lists, and helping promote our services online and through direct outreach.



Key Responsibilities

Lead Research & Identification

Hospitals



Dialysis centers



Nursing homes

s

title: Direct Response Performance Video Editor – DTC Meta Ads
description:
**Position: Video Editor –
 Ad Creatives**  

**Type: Full-Time (40 hours/week, Remote)**  

**Compensation: $1,500–$2,000/month (based on experience) + Performance Bonuses**  

**Start Date: ASAP**



---



IMPORTANT: Must have previous experience with direct response creatives, meta ads, VSL-style and basic marketing fundamentals knowledge (like awareness stages, desires, etc).





**About Us**



We're a 7-figure/month DTC brand that launched just 3-4 months ago and scaled aggressively. We're a small, lean team looking for a killer video editor who can help us dominate Meta with high-converting direct response ads.



This is a ground-floor opportunity. We're building out our video creative team from scratch, and the right person will grow with us—eventually leading the video department as we scale and bring more editors under you.



---



**Why This Role is Massive**



- **We're brand new and already hitting 7-figures/month** – you're getting in early

- **Small team = big impact** – your work directly affects revenue

- **We're just getting into video** – tons of potential to hit winners and own the creative direction

- **Performance bonuses** – you get paid when your ads perform

- **Growth path** – potential to become Head of Video as we scale

- **We move fast** – no corporate BS, just results



---



**Responsibilities**



- Edit short-form video ads for
 (15 sec to 2 min)

- **Source your own B-roll** – authentic, engaging footage that fits educational/conspiracy-style storytelling

- **Use AI tools to create ultra-realistic B-roll and UGC/talking heads** (Runway, Veo, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, etc.)

- Work with raw UGC, voiceovers, product clips, and AI-generated content

- Follow direct-response frameworks for hooks, pacing, captions, and CTAs

- Create **educational, unaware-stage ads** with strong storytelling, stats, and engaging narratives

- Add subtitles, transitions, sound effects for max engagement

- Deliver in multiple aspect ratios (1:1, 4:5, 9:16) as needed

- Follow creative briefs from our Creative Strategist and Copywriter

- Collaborate via 
 and meet deadlines consistently



---



**Requirements (Non-Negotiable)**



- **2+ years editing DTC/e-commerce ads** (must have portfolio of ads that actually ran on Meta)

- **Proficient with AI video generation tools** (Runway, Veo, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, Pika, etc.)

- **Can source your own B-roll** – you need to know where to find engaging footage for educational/storytelling ads

- Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro or CapCut

- **Experience with conspiracy/educational-style content** (think supplement brands, unaware-stage storytelling, stats-driven narratives)

- Strong understanding of direct-response ad fundamentals (hooks, awareness levels, thumb-stop ratios)

- Fluent in English (spoken and written)

- Detail-oriented, organized, and consistent

- **Full-time availability** – this is not a side gig

- **Enthusiastic and hungry** – we're looking for someone who wants to crush it and grow long-term with us



---



**What We're Looking For**



We don't want someone who just executes. We want a **killer** who:

- Can create engaging, educational content with conspiracy/storytelling angles

- Understands how to build unaware-stage ads with stats, narratives, and hooks that stop the scroll

- Can take a script and make creative decisions that improve performance

- Is obsessed with making ads that convert, not just look good

- Wants to grow with a fast-scaling brand and build something



---



**What We Offer**



- **$1,500–$2,000/month** (based on experience)

- **Performance bonuses** – direct % on winning ads

- **40 flexible remote hours/week**

- **Long-term growth potential** – lead the video department as we scale

- Clear briefs, fast feedback, collaborative team

- Work on a brand hitting 7-figs/month with room to make a real impact



---



**How to Apply**



Send an
 to 
 with the subject line:  

**Video Editor – [Your Name]**



Include:

- Brief intro about yourself

- Portfolio or examples of *
 ads you've edited that actually ran** (include performance context if possible)

- Your availability and time zone

- Short explanation of **why you'd crush it in this role** and why you're excited about the opportunity

- Examples of AI-generated content or B-roll sourcing work you've done



**Note:** 

We're looking for someone who understands educational/storytelling ads with engaging narratives and can create content that resonates with unaware audiences. If you don't have experience with this style or can't show relevant work, don't apply.

title: Power Platform Developer (Power BI Focus) – Contract
description:
Who We Are 



Burwood Group is not your average technology consulting firm. We are an innovative, culture-driven industry leader that helps companies use and manage technology to transform business and improve outcomes. Founded in 1997 and headquartered in Oak Brook, IL, we've grown to be a 200+ employee firm with team members located across the United States.



Burwood fosters an employee ownership culture that celebrates both teamwork and personal growth. We’ve cultivated an incredible team of people who are dedicated to their craft and passionate about using their skills to make a meaningful impact on our customers’ success.  Join our team and build a career as unique as you are. 



We are seeking an experienced Power Platform Developer (Power BI Focus) on a 6 month contract basis to design, enhance, and support Power BI reporting and analytics solutions. This role is delivery-oriented and ideal for a consultant who can quickly understand business requirements, work independently, and produce high-quality, scalable Power BI solutions within defined timelines.



The contractor will primarily focus on Power BI development, with light integration into the broader Microsoft Power Platform as needed.



Key Responsibilities



Power BI Delivery

• Design, develop, and enhance Power BI reports, dashboards, and datasets based on business requirements

• Build and optimize data models using DAX and Power Query (M)

• Implement row-level security (RLS) and ensure appropriate access controls

• Improve report performance, refresh reliability, and usability

• Translate loosely defined requirements into clear, actionable analytics



Power Platform & Integration



• Integrate Power BI with SharePoint, Excel, Power Apps, Power Automate, and Dataverse as required

• Support embedded Power BI and cross-workspace reporting scenarios

• Provide recommendations on Power Platform best practices and architecture

Stakeholder & Delivery Support

• Collaborate with business users, analysts, and technical teams during the contract period

• Provide documentation, knowledge transfer, and handoff at project milestones

• Troubleshoot and resolve Power BI–related issues efficiently



Required Skills & Experience



• 3+ years of hands-on Power BI development experience

• Strong expertise in DAX, Power Query (M), and dimensional data modeling

• Experience with Power BI Service, workspaces, apps, and deployment pipelines

• Solid understanding of SQL and relational databases

• Ability to work independently and deliver against tight deadlines

• Strong communication skills for working with both technical and non-technical stakeholders



Preferred / Nice-to-Have



• Experience with Power Apps and Power Automate

• Familiarity with Azure data services (Azure SQL, Synapse, Data Factory)

• Experience in Power BI Premium / Microsoft Fabric environments

• Microsoft certifications (e.g., PL-300)

• Prior consulting or contract-based project experience

Your main responsibilities

- Edit videos using tools such as CapCut or similar editing software

- Create professional product images using AI tools we provide

- Design high quality visuals for product pages

- Maintain a consistent visual style and branding

- Deliver content efficiently and on schedule

- Tools you may work with

- CapCut

- AI image generation tools

- ChatGPT

- Other content creation tools



Experience with these tools is a big advantage.



What we are looking for



- We are only looking for candidates who:

- Have strong experience with TikTok video editing

- Understand what makes products sell in e-commerce

- Have experience creating product focused content

- Have experience with AI image generation tools

- Have a strong eye for product presentation and design

- Are independent and proactive

- Communicate clearly in English

- Are reliable and detail oriented



Important



We are looking for someone who can think along with the business and solve problems independently.



You should be comfortable with:



- Figuring things out when needed

- Improving content quality

- Working efficiently without constant supervision



How to apply



To apply, please include the following:

title: Google Ads Account Manager
description:
We are looking for a skilled Google Ads Account Manager to join our team and manage performance-driven advertising campaigns across Google platforms. In this role, you will be responsible for planning, executing, and optimizing Google Ads campaigns to achieve measurable marketing results.



Job Summary



As a Google Ads Account Manager, you will oversee advertising accounts, monitor campaign performance, and implement optimization strategies to improve conversions and return on ad spend. This position requires strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple campaigns effectively.

• Manage and optimize Google Ads campaigns across Search, Display, and other networks

• Monitor campaign performance and adjust strategies to improve results

• Conduct keyword research and competitor analysis

• Develop and implement A/B testing strategies for ads and landing pages

• Analyze campaign data and prepare performance reports

• Manage budgets efficiently to maximize ROI



Requirements

???? HOW TO APPLY:

To apply, please send me a SHORT voice recording (30–60 seconds) introducing yourself and telling me why you'd be good at this role. This is required — applications without a voice note will not be considered.

Send your voice note + a brief message about your experience to either:

???? WhatsApp:

I will personally respond to every serious applicant. Looking to hire within the next few days.

title: Outbound Enrollment Closer – Career Certification Programs (Remote, EST)
description:
Outbound Enrollment Closer – Career Certification Programs (Remote, EST)



This is not customer service.

This is not inbound order-taking.



This is a phone-driven, outbound enrollment closer role for professionals who know how to control a consult, qualify fast, overcome objections, and close.



We are a U.S.-based online career school enrolling students into IT and Project Management certification programs (CompTIA, PMP, and related tracks). We provide warm leads. You bring the discipline, urgency, and closing skill.



What You’ll Be Doing (Daily Reality)



Make high-volume outbound calls to prospective students



Run structured, consultative enrollment calls (needs analysis ? recommendation ? close)



Control the call, set next steps, and ask for the enrollment



Handle objections around price, time, confidence, and urgency



Follow up relentlessly until the prospect converts or disqualifies



Log activity and outcomes accurately in CRM



Hit daily activity targets and monthly enrollment goals



Improve close rates through coaching, scripts, and call reviews



If you don’t like calling, this role will break you.



Who This Role Is For



Proven outbound / inside sales closers



Comfortable dialing daily and living on the phone



Strong command of English with clear U.S. cultural fluency



Confident asking direct questions and pushing for decisions



Competitive, coachable, metrics-driven



Organized and accountable without supervision



Experience selling education, training, coaching, or professional services is a major plus



Familiarity with certifications (CompTIA, PMP) helps—but closing ability matters more



Bachelor’s degree required



Who Should NOT Apply



Anyone who needs inbound-only leads



Anyone uncomfortable asking for money



Anyone who avoids objection handling



Anyone who wants a “soft” admissions role



Anyone who disappears when targets tighten



Schedule



Monday–Friday



10:00 AM – 6:30 PM EST



Compensation



Base pay: $1,200–$1,600 USD per month



Performance-based advancement and leadership path



Long-term role with stability and growth for performers



(Top performers move fast. Average performers don’t last.)



What You Get



Warm leads with real intent



Clear scripts, frameworks, and coaching



No gimmicks, no fake promises—just real programs that work



A sales culture that rewards results



Bottom Line



If you can:



Control a sales conversation



Build urgency without lying



Close consistently



Take coaching and improve



You will win here.



If not—this role will expose you quickly.

title: Automation
description:
I would like the automation system to work so that it remains simple for me to operate after the setup.

The system analyzes MLS CSV data to produce two types of reports:



• Submarket reports

• Property analysis reports



The workflow uses MLS CSV exports, Google Sheets for calculations, OpenClaw running on Hostinger for AI report generation, and Squarespace for publishing the final reports.



The workflow should function as follows.

1. I manually export an CSV file and upload it.

When a new CSV is uploaded, the system should automatically replace the previous RawCSV tab so the RawCSV always contains the latest dataset.

2. The Clean Data tab should automatically clean and structure the CSV data using formulas. This tab should never require manual editing.

3. Once the Clean Data tab fills with data, all the benchmark tabs should automatically update.

All of these benchmarks should calculate their values from the Clean Data tab.

4. The Control Panel should store the different search criteria used for my analyses.

5. I would like a button in Google Sheets called Run Submarket Report.When this button is clicked, OpenClaw running on Hostinger should read the benchmark data from Google Sheets and generate a submarket report explaining the market conditions and investment signals for that dataset.



6. The Property Analysis sheet should automatically pull benchmark numbers from the submarket report sheet so that every property analysis uses the correct market benchmarks.



7. I would also like a second button called Run Property Analysis.When this button is clicked, OpenClaw should analyze the selected property using the benchmark data and generate a property analysis report.



8. Google Sheets should perform all numeric calculations, including:



• price per square foot

• median values

• percentiles

• discount vs market

• flip signal

• development signal

• rental signal



OpenClaw should not perform calculations. Its role should be:



• explanation

• summary

• investor-style reasoning

• report writing



9. The Run Log should record the history of reports generated.



10. After OpenClaw generates the report, the final report should automatically publish to my Squarespace website.



Reports should be uploaded into their respective blog templates:



• Submarket Blog for submarket reports

• Property Analysis Blog for property analysis reports



Each report should use the correct Squarespace blog template so the site remains organized and optimized for search engines.



The goal is that I can run the system by uploading a CSV, selecting my search criteria from the Control Panel, and clicking the appropriate button to generate the report

title: Senior GCP Backend Engineer – Secure Medical Document Storage Architecture
description:
We are building a medical-legal platform using Django (Django REST Framework), PostgreSQL, and Google Cloud Platform. We are seeking a highly experienced backend cloud engineer to design and integrate a secure, production-grade document management subsystem using Google Cloud Storage.



This is not a basic file upload feature. We need an expert who understands secure object storage architecture, long-term data lifecycle design, and strict access isolation in regulated environments.



Project Scope



Design and implement a cloud-based document storage system that:



Uses Google Cloud Storage with lifecycle tiering (Standard, Nearline, Coldline, Archive)



Enforces a locked 5-year retention policy (Bucket Retention Lock)



Implements strict IAM with least-privilege principles



Uses signed URLs for upload and download (no public file exposure)



Integrates with our existing Django backend authorization model



Enforces claim-level access isolation (doctors must only access documents tied to claims assigned to them)



Supports encryption (CMEK preferred) and audit logging



Is scalable, secure, and production-ready



All document metadata will remain in PostgreSQL. The backend must remain the sole gatekeeper for file access. Storage must never independently determine user permissions.



Required Experience



Applicants must demonstrate:



Proven experience architecting secure systems in Google Cloud Platform



Strong experience with Google Cloud Storage, lifecycle rules, and retention policies



Hands on experience implementing signed URL workflows



Deep understanding of IAM, service accounts, and least-privilege design



Experience integrating object storage into Django or comparable backend frameworks



Experience designing entity-level authorization enforcement at the API layer



Experience handling sensitive or compliance-oriented data environments



Important



We are not looking for someone to “add file uploads.”

We are looking for someone who has built secure, scalable, long-term document storage systems in production and understands the architectural implications of handling sensitive medical-legal data.



Please include examples of similar systems you have designed or implemented, specifically involving GCP storage lifecycle management and access isolation.

title: Graphic Designer for High-Volume Paid Social Ads (Figma Expert)
description:
Let’s be real: I’m not looking for a typical freelancer who just wants to make things "look nice."



I’m the Creative Strategist at Oduree. We are scaling our ad production from 100 to 400+ statics a month. This role is 100% focused on high-volume social media ads (FB, IG, TikTok). I don't need a "creative director"; I need a Production Partner. Someone who understands that in performance marketing, speed and precision are everything. (ONLY FREELANCERS NO AGENCIES)



The Reality of the Role:

Marketing moves fast. Sometimes we find a winning angle and need iterations live ASAP. We need someone who is flexible and responsive. If you are a "9-5 and then I disappear" type of person, this is NOT for you. We need someone who can handle the pressure of high-volume output without losing quality.



Who You Are:



A Finisher: You check your own work. If I have to spot typos, misalignment, or wrong export settings, we are not a match.



Organized: We work with massive volumes. Your Figma files and naming conventions must be flawless.



Fast: You can take one winning concept and turn it into 10 variations and 2 sizes in no time.



Figma Specialist: We work exclusively in Figma. You must be an expert.



Communicator: You are proactive. You don’t disappear; you keep me updated so I never have to chase you.



The Work:



Designing high-converting static ads for Social Media.



Executing concepts based on my strategy and references.



Fast iterations and resizing.



???? HOW TO APPLY (Read Carefully)

I ignore generic, AI-generated applications. If you want a response, you must follow these instructions:



Start your application with the word "SCALE".



Portfolio is a MUST: Attach or link your portfolio specifically showing Social Media / Static Ad designs. No portfolio = No reply.



Briefly tell me about your experience with high-volume design work.



Confirm you are comfortable with flexible availability and fast deadlines.



Mention your favorite Figma shortcut so I know you actually use the tool.



I am looking to hire FAST. If your portfolio looks good and you follow these instructions, I will contact you immediately for a trial.

title: Short-Form Video Editor for Instagram Reels (Fitness Content)
description:
I am a fitness coach and content creator looking for a skilled video editor to help me edit short-form videos for Instagram Reels.



The content will mainly include:

• Gym footage

• Talking head clips

• Transformation clips

• Educational fitness content



The style is clean, engaging, and modern, with captions, smooth cuts, and occasional sound effects.



This role has the potential to become long-term work if we are a good fit.



What I’m Looking For



You must be able to:



• Edit engaging Instagram Reels (15–45 seconds)

• Add captions and subtitles

• Cut clips to keep the video fast and engaging

• Add sound effects, zooms, and basic motion graphics

• Follow reference styles I provide

• Deliver videos quickly



Bonus if you understand fitness content or social media trends.



Editing Style



I’m looking for editing similar to:



• Alex Hormozi style captions

• Fast-paced cuts

• Clean zoom transitions

• Simple but high-quality visuals



The goal is high retention and engagement.



Trial Task (Important)



To find the right editor, I will be sending the same sample video to 10 different editors.



Each editor will be asked to edit the video in their style.



The editor who:



• Delivers the best looking video

• Submits the edit in the shortest reasonable time (48–72 hours maximum)

• Shows the best attention to detail



will be selected for the role.



This is a trial to find the best long-term editor to work with.



Work Expectations



If hired, you can expect:

title: Bookkeeper
description:
We are a boutique Canadian accounting and advisory firm looking for a strong, detail-oriented Senior Bookkeeper / Client Accounting Manager to take ownership of a growing portfolio of bookkeeping clients.



This is not a junior data-entry role. We are looking for someone who can manage client files directly, keep books clean and current, understand how transactions flow across multiple related entities, and prepare organized year-end working papers so the accountant can efficiently complete corporate tax returns, year-end files, and compilation engagements.



This role is being hired as a core replacement bookkeeping function, as our current part-time bookkeeper is leaving and we expect this person to directly manage a meaningful portion of the bookkeeping work.



Over time, the role may expand to include support with CaseWare working paper files and compilation-ready year-end files, depending on experience.



Our Client Base



Our clients are primarily:



Healthcare professionals and professional corporations



Dentists, doctors, and other incorporated professionals



Owner-managed businesses



Holding companies and groups of related corporations



Entrepreneurial and service-based businesses



Clients with more complex files involving shareholder transactions, intercompany balances, and multiple entities under common ownership



Key Responsibilities



Manage bookkeeping directly for a portfolio of clients



Maintain accurate books in QuickBooks Online and other systems as needed



Perform and maintain:



Bank reconciliations



Credit card reconciliations



Accounts payable and accounts receivable coding



GST/HST coding and reconciliations



Payroll entries and payroll-related reconciliations



Loan and shareholder loan reconciliations



Intercompany account reconciliations



Balance sheet reconciliations and month-end close



Understand and properly flow transactions across multiple related entities within a group of companies



Track and reconcile:



Intercompany balances



Management fees



Shareholder transactions



Corporate card spending



Owner draws



Loan balances and repayments



Prepare organized year-end working papers for accountant review, including:



Lead sheets



Bank and credit card reconciliations



GST/HST reconciliation



Payroll reconciliation



Fixed asset continuity



Prepaids and accruals



Loan continuity



Shareholder loan continuity



Intercompany continuity



Identify bookkeeping issues early and flag unusual items before year-end



Help manage workflow and quality control for any bookkeeping support resources used by the firm



Assist with onboarding, cleanup, and catch-up bookkeeping projects as needed



Communicate clearly regarding missing documents, open questions, and file status



Over time, potentially assist with CaseWare working paper preparation and compilation support, depending on skill level



Ideal Candidate



You are someone who:



Understands bookkeeping in a way that supports year-end accounting and tax work



Can think through entries instead of just coding transactions mechanically



Is comfortable with multi-entity files, intercompany balances, and shareholder accounts



Appreciates clean documentation and supporting schedules



Can manage files independently and take ownership



Is organized, proactive, and strong on follow-up



Wants to grow into a broader client accounting role over time



Required Experience



-3+ years of bookkeeping experience, ideally in a public accounting firm, outsourced accounting practice, or multi-client environment



-Strong QuickBooks Online experience



-Strong Excel skills



Experience with:



-Multi-entity bookkeeping



-Intercompany reconciliations



-Shareholder loan accounts



-Month-end close



-Year-end working papers



-Strong English communication skills



-High attention to detail and good judgment



-Ability to work independently and manage deadlines



Strong Assets



-Experience with Canadian bookkeeping files



-Familiarity with GST/HST



-Experience with professional corporations, holdcos, and owner-managed businesses



-Experience preparing files for corporate tax and compilation support



-Experience with CaseWare or CaseWare Working Papers



-Experience reviewing junior or offshore bookkeeping work



What Success Looks Like



-Books are current, accurate, and well organized



-Intercompany and balance sheet accounts reconcile properly



-Year-end files are clean and usable



-The accountant can move into T2 and compilation work without redoing the bookkeeping



-Client files are being proactively managed without constant oversight

title: Automation Strategist (Zapier / Make / n8n) – Dayshift
description:
We are a growing startup based in Australia looking for TWO Automation Strategists to help build and optimize workflow automations for internal operations and client projects.



Because our team is based in Australia, this role follows a day shift schedule in the Philippines, making it ideal for candidates who prefer daytime work hours.



We are looking for individuals who are passionate about automation, efficiency, and problem solving. You will work on designing, implementing, and communicating automations that connect different tools and eliminate repetitive tasks.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys building systems and improving processes, and who is open to learning. You will receive training from our in-house automation strategist and will use our premium tools to further develop your skillset.



Responsibilities:

- Build workflow automations (Zapier, make, n8n) from scratch 

- Connect different apps and platforms to streamline business operations

- Troubleshoot broken automations and optimize existing workflows

- Document automation processes clearly

- Suggest improvements to increase efficiency

- Collaborate with the team to identify opportunities for automation



Requirements:

- At least 1 year experience with workflow automation, OR

- Strong portfolio showcasing automation projects (if you have no experience yet)



Additional qualities we look for:

- Strong logical thinking and problem-solving skills

- Ability to explain automations clearly

- A "figure-it-out" type of person

- Can work under minimal supervision

- Good communication skills



Preferred but not a requirement

- Has experience working on a car dealership or insurance company, OR

- Has interest in cars



Compensation



Remote work



Dayshift schedule (Philippine time)



Please include the following in your application:

1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Automation tools you have used

3. A portfolio or examples of automations you have built

4. A brief description of your most complex automation



To confirm that you have read the entire job post, please include the name of your favorite car brand at the end of your application message. Applications without a portfolio or that do not follow the instructions may not be prioritized.



We are excited to meet individuals who are passionate about automation and eager to grow with our team.

title: #???? Short-Form Video Editor — Early Team. Profit Share. Real Upside.
description:
**Month 1: 1,000,000 views. Zero ad spend. Pure organic.**



We're not a big company. We're a small team of killers building an app that's already getting traction in Europe and we're just getting started.



---



## The opportunity



We run a **fast-growing consumer app** in one of the most viral niches on the internet right now. The founder has already scaled previous products to **$80K MRR**. This one has stronger viral fundamentals.



We need one elite editor to help us go from **1M to 10M views per month.**



---



## How this works



- You get **3 short-form videos per day** and content is provided

- Estimated time: **~1 hour of work daily**

- This is a **profit-sharing role** and you grow when the app grows



This is not a traditional salary job. This is an early-stage seat at the table.



**The editors who join early at startups like this don't stay at $600/month. They grow with the product.**



---



## The earning model



You earn based on **performance and growth milestones** and as views scale, so does your cut. Editors hitting targets at full scale are on track for **$3,000+/month** as we move to a full-time 15-video/day operation.



We'll discuss exact terms with the right candidate. We're looking for someone who wants to **win together**, not just collect a paycheck.



---



## You are the one if:



- You live and breathe TikTok, Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- You know how to **kill the first 0.3 seconds** of a video

- You can make raw content into something people share

- You want to be part of something early and get rewarded for it

- You're fast, reliable, and hungry



---



## The roadmap



| Phase | Vids/day | Target views | Opportunity |

| Now | 3 | 5M/month | Profit share, grow with us |

| Validated | 8 | 10M+/month | Increased share + bonuses |

| Scale | 15 | 20M+/month | Full-time + $3,000+/month |



---



## To apply



Send the following to 



1. Your **3 best short-form edits** (links only)

2. Answer in one sentence: *what makes someone stop scrolling?*

3. Your **fastest turnaround time** per video



**We reply fast. We move fast. We want someone who does the same.**



---



*Early stage means no guarantees. It means unlimited ceiling. If you want safety, this isn't for you. If you want to build something real and get paid when it wins, we want to hear from you.*

title: Video creation
description:
I need a 45-50 second YouTube channel trailer for an American nostalgia documentary channel (55+ male audience watching on large TVs).



What I need you to deliver (full production):



Source/select 15-20 stock footage clips and images matching warm 1970s-80s Kodachrome aesthetic (mall interiors, department stores, suburban neighborhoods, kids on bikes, family cars, gas stations, school hallways — American nostalgia)

Record or produce voiceover from my provided script (~115 words)

Select royalty-free background music (warm, nostalgic, emotional — NOT corporate/upbeat)

Edit into a 45-50 second finished trailer (1920x1080, 16:9)

Warm cinematic color grading (amber/golden, film grain — NOT modern/corporate)

Smooth transitions (dissolves, not hard cuts) — like flipping through old photographs

End card with channel tagline + subscribe button animation

Export as MP4, H.264, high bitrate



Style:

Ken Burns documentary meets warm film photography. Slow, emotional, cinematic. NOT flashy YouTube intros with 3D text and explosions. This should feel like sitting on a porch remembering the old days.

Critical: The audience is 55+ men on 55"+ TVs. Everything must read at 10 feet. No tiny text, no rapid flash cuts.

I will provide:



Final script with timestamps

Brand guidelines (color palette: cream/chocolate brown/harvest gold, Cooper Black font)

3-4 short clips from my existing published videos to weave in

Channel logo



Turnaround: 5-7 days

To apply:



Share 1-2 examples of warm/cinematic or documentary-style editing

Confirm you can source stock footage (Envato Elements, Storyblocks, or similar)

title: Shopify E-commerce Operator (Founder’s Right Hand)
description:
We are building a fast-growing U.S. e-commerce brand and we are looking for a serious, experienced Shopify operator to become the founder’s right hand. You need to be a REAL LEADER and problem solver. 



This is NOT a beginner VA position.

This is for someone who has actually managed and operated Shopify stores.



Role Overview



You will be responsible for day-to-day operations inside our Shopify ecosystem, including:



- Product listings (variants, metafields, mockups, descriptions)

- Printify product setup + syncing

- Order management & fulfillment checks

- Customer support handling 
 based)

- Refunds / returns / tracking issues

- App setup & optimization

- Basic theme edits (sections, layout adjustments)

- Uploading ad creatives & organizing assets

- Supplier communication when needed

- Helping improve systems & processes



You must think in systems, not tasks.



This Job Is For You If: (Min. 3+ years experience as virtual assistant)



- You have managed multiple Shopify stores 

- You understand fulfillment flows end-to-end

- You have worked with Printify or POD before (Preferred, or willing to learn quickly)

- You can troubleshoot Shopify issues independently

- You are extremely organized and detail-oriented

- You don’t wait for instructions — you take ownership

- You know how to hire and build a team

- You are calm under pressure

- You are a quick learner and a real leader



Do NOT Apply If:

- You’ve only “assisted” but never operated a store

- You need constant supervision

- You disappear or go offline during work hours

- You are managing 3–4 other full-time clients



Work Requirements



- 48 hours per week

- Flexible schedule, but you must be consistently online and reachable

- Fast response time is critical

- Long-term position only



Compensation



$1,000 USD per month starting



Growth to $1,500 USD per month based on performance



Long-term opportunity with growth into operations leadership



Application Instructions (Important)

Start your application with the word: OPERATOR



Applications without these answers will be ignored.

title: Virtual Assistant Production Support Coordinator - HUGE PAY
description:
Virtual Assistant Production Support Coordinator



Remote Contract Position — HUGE PAY + 13th Month Bonus



Position Type: Independent Contractor (Contract) 

Location: Remote (Philippines) 

Schedule: Full-time, 40 hours/week during US Mountain Time business hours 

Compensation: $1900 USD/month + performance bonuses + 13th month bonus



Important: This Is a Contract Position



This is an independent contractor virtual assistant role, not an employee position. You will be responsible for your own taxes and any obligations required by Philippine law. Bellwether will not withhold taxes, provide benefits, or cover any employer-side obligations. You will be paid as a vendor for services rendered.



By applying, you acknowledge and accept these terms.



About Bellwether



Bellwether Homes is a family-owned exterior remodeling company based in Denver, Colorado. We specialize in premium siding replacement and window replacement solutions for homeowners in Colorado's mountain and destination communities.



We're not the cheapest contractor—we're the best. We are one of the top James Hardie Elite contractors in the United States and one of just nine Pella Platinum Premier dealers in the entire United States. Our clients choose us because they want their project done right the first time, with craftsmanship that lasts for decades.



We're a small but growing team that values clarity, accountability, and people who take ownership of their work. We measure what matters, and everyone knows exactly what's expected of them. 



Our Core Values



These aren't just words on a wall. We hire, evaluate, and fire people based on these values:

Relentless & Reliable — We do what we say we'll do, every time. We show up prepared and follow through without being reminded.

Always Getting Better — We're learners. We seek feedback, adapt quickly, and never settle for "good enough."

Measure Twice — We think before we act. Precision and attention to detail prevent costly mistakes.

Win as a Team — No lone wolves. We communicate openly, support each other, and share credit.

Customer Obsessed — Every decision runs through one filter: what's best for the homeowner?

If these values resonate with you, keep reading. If they don't, this isn't the right fit.



About This Role



We're looking for a Virtual Assistant Production Support Coordinator to support our Production Coordinator. You'll help keep projects moving, customers informed, and details documented. Some days you'll be the friendly voice calling homeowners with updates; other days you'll be placing material orders or scheduling inspections. The work varies, but the goal is constant: make sure nothing falls through the cracks.



This role matters because our reputation is built on flawless execution. When a Colorado family trusts us with their home, they're counting on us to deliver on time, on budget, and without surprises. Your work behind the scenes makes that possible.

You'll work closely with our Production Coordinator, who handles on-the-ground project management. Your job is to handle the administrative coordination and customer communication so they can focus on quality and problem-solving.



This role is ideal for someone who:

• Takes genuine satisfaction in creating order from chaos

• Has exceptional attention to detail and catches mistakes others miss

• Communicates proactively—you don't wait to be asked for updates

• Can manage multiple projects simultaneously without dropping balls

• Enjoys talking to customers and making them feel taken care of

• Wants to be part of a team, even from thousands of miles away

 

What You'll Be Doing



Order & Material Coordination

• Place material orders with vendors based on estimates, meeting notes, and field-verified measurements

• Track order status and delivery dates, following up with suppliers as needed

• Coordinate delivery schedules and pickups with vendors and job sites

• Arrange material returns after job completion and ensure credits are applied to the correct project

• Maintain accurate records of what's on order, what's delivered, and what's in inventory



Scheduling & Calendar Management

• Schedule pre-construction meetings, inspections, and production-related appointments using cloud-based calendar systems

• Coordinate schedules for subcontractors, in-house installers, and service calls

• Track and communicate project timelines across the team

• Manage warranty and service call scheduling



Documentation & CRM Management

• Update and maintain project files in our CRM (Acculynx), including job expenses, notes, and documentation

• Attach all relevant documents to the correct project file

• Document everything in writing—if it's not written down, it didn't happen

• Create and maintain process documentation as new workflows are developed

• Proofread documents for accuracy before they go to customers or vendors



Permitting & Inspections

• Assist with filing permit applications for various Colorado municipalities

• Schedule midpoint and final inspections as required by each jurisdiction

• Track permit status and ensure all inspections are completed on schedule



Reporting & Communication

• Track and report on the weekly/monthly production pipeline as orders are placed and delivery dates confirmed

• Communicate project status updates across the organization

• Provide notes and analysis on individual project performance when requested

• Participate in tea
etings via video call



Customer Communication

• Communicate professionally with customers throughout the project lifecycle

• Provide project updates, answer questions, and ensure a great customer experience

• Handle customer inquiries with patience and professionalism, even when they're anxious or frustrated

• Inspire confidence in Bellwether through every interaction



Schedule & Hours



Hours: 40 hours per week Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM US Mountain Time (with a 1-hour lunch break)

You'll be working during US business hours, which means this will be a nigh
 morning schedule for you. We understand you'll be nocturnal, and we respect that. We won't spring last-minute schedule changes on you, and we understand that days off sometimes need to be 1.5 days so you can readjust your sleep schedule.



We need someone who can commit to this schedule consistently. Reliability is one of our core values—our production team and customers are counting on you being available during these hours.



You must be 100% available during scheduled hours for ad-hoc video calls, phone calls, customer calls, and to resolve requests in a timely manner as they come up throughout the day.



Compensation



We believe in paying well and building loyalty. Here's what you can expect:

Base Pay: $1900 USD per month. For the first two months, we will pay weekly, after work is completed, $440/week. You will be paid via 
. 

Performance Bonuses: Based on individual performance. By achieving certain goals, you will earn bonuses for performance, of up to $150/week. 

13th Month Bonus: Yes, we honor the 13th month. In early December, you'll receive a bonus equal to one month's compensation (prorated if you started mid-year). This is standard practice for us—we want you to have a great Christmas with your family.

We pay well because we expect excellence. In return for competitive compensation, we ask that you work exclusively for Bellwether. We know it's common to work multiple jobs simultaneously. We're paying you enough that you don't have to. We need your full focus and your best effort.

If we discover you're working other jobs during your scheduled hours with us, the contract ends immediately. No exceptions. This is a dealbreaker.



What We're Looking For



Required:

• Impeccable English—written and spoken. You'll be communicating with American homeowners, vendors, and tea
mbers. We will test this thoroughly.

• Reliable high-speed internet connection (minimum 100 Mbps download)

• Quiet, professional workspace for phone and video calls

• Ability to work the full scheduled hours consistently

• Undergraduate degree from an accredited university

• Exceptional attention to detail: you catch errors others miss

• Strong organizational skills: you can manage tasks on multiple projects without losing track

• Proficiency with cloud-based software, CRMs, spreadsheets, and calendar systems

• Ability to proofread documents for grammatical, typographical, and contextual errors

• Professional phone manner and written communication skills



Strongly Preferred:

• 2+ years of experience in administrative assistant work, construction coordination, home services, or remodeling industry

• Familiarity with construction terminology (windows, siding, permits, inspections, etc.)

• Experience with CRM systems (Acculynx experience is a plus)

• Previous experience supporting US-based companies remotely

• Experience coordinating schedules, orders, or logistics

• Masters degree from an accredited university



Who thrives in this role:

• People who take pride in being organized and thorough

• People who communicate proactively—you tell us about problems before we have to ask

• People who genuinely enjoy helping customers and making them feel taken care of

• People who want to learn the construction industry and grow their skills

• People who can handle anxious or frustrated customers with patience and professionalism

• People who appreciate being treated well and return that loyalty with excellent work



What It's Like to Work With Us



You'll always know what's expected of you and how you're performing. Everyone has clear responsibilities and measurable goals. We have weekly tea
etings (via video call for you) and regular daily check-ins with your manager. You won't be left wondering if you're doing a good job.



We treat our tea
mbers like people, not resources. We'll ask how you're doing. We'll remember what's happening in your life. We'll celebrate your wins and help you improve in areas where you're struggling. Even though you're thousands of miles away, you're part of our team.



We believe in trust. What matters is your performance and results. We will be able to know if you are working only for us by tracking your performance. Hit your numbers, do excellent work, communicate proactively, and you'll have a long, rewarding relationship with Bellwether.



You will be expected to sign:

• An Independent Contractor Agreement

• A Confidentiality Agreement



How to Apply



Step 1: Attach your resume. Send us a message with your resume attached that includes the following. 

Step 2: Record a Vocaroo. Go to 
 and record a 2–3 minute audio message. In your recording, tell us:

• A brief overview of your relevant experience (especially any construction, home services, or logistics coordination)

• Why you're interested in this specific role at Bellwether. Please mention the role and company by name. 

• Why you'd be a great fit for our team - SELL us on you!

Include the link to your Vocaroo recording in your reply. This is how we evaluate your spoken English—take your time, speak clearly, and make a great impression.

Step 3: Internet speed test. Go to speedtest.net, run a test, and take a screenshot showing your download and upload speeds. Attach the screenshot to your reply.

Step 4: Tell us why you. In the body of your reply, write a paragraph in your own words (not AI) explaining why you're the right person for this job. What makes you confident you can excel in this role? So that we know you read the entire job description, write the word Summit in the subject line of your reply.  



What Happens Next



If your application meets our criteria, we'll reach out to schedule a video interview via Google Meet. Please have your camera on. We want to meet you face-to-face.

We're hiring now and ready to move very quickly with the right candidate.

If you're someone who takes pride in being organized and reliable, wants to be treated well and compensated VERY WELL, and is looking for a long-term home with a company that values your contributions—we can't wait to meet you.



Bellwether Homes is Colorado's Premier Exterior Remodeling Company

title: Credit Repair Disputer
description:
MUST SEND A 60 SECOND LOOM WITH YOUR EXPERIENCE TO BE CONSIDERED FOR POSITION!



Virtual Assistant for Credit Repair and Financial Literacy



Location: Remote



Are you passionate about helping others achieve financial freedom and literacy? We are seeking a skilled Virtual Assistant to join our team and assist clients in disputing inaccurate credit reports and navigating the complex world of credit repair and financial literacy.



YOU MUST RECORD A 2 MIN OR 60 SECOND VIDEO EXPLAINING YOUR KNOWLEDGE AND EXPERIENCE ALONG WITH PROVEN RESULTS OF YOUR WORK OR YOU WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED.



Responsibilities:

- Dispute inaccurate credit reports on behalf of clients, adhering to the laws outlined in the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA).

- File complaints with consumer protection agencies such as the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB), Better Business Bureau (BBB), and Attorney General's office when necessary.

- Utilize extensive knowledge of the credit repair process in America to provide expert guidance and support to clients.

- Communicate effectively with clients to address their concerns, answer inquiries, and provide updates on the dispute process.

- Demonstrate true determination and heart in advocating for clients' rights and financial well-being.



Qualifications:

- Previous experience working with a credit repair company, with a strong understanding of the credit repair process.

- Extensive knowledge of the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) and other relevant laws governing credit reporting and repair.

- Proven ability to file complaints with consumer protection agencies, such as the CFPB, BBB, and Attorney General's office.

- Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to empathize and connect with clients.

- True determination and heart to help clients overcome financial challenges and achieve their goals.



Benefits:

- Flexible remote work environment.

- Opportunity to make a meaningful impact in the lives of others.

- Competitive compensation package.



If you have a passion for helping others and possess the skills and qualifications listed above, we want to hear from you! Apply now to join our team and make a difference in the world of credit repair and financial literacy.



3 Commas Solutions is an equal opportunity employer and values diversity in the workplace. We encourage applications from all qualified individuals regardless of race, ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, disability, or other protected status.
