title: Senior AWS DevOps Engineer – AWS Cost Optimization & Kubernetes
description:
Job Description:

About the Role

We're a blockchain/DeFi company running production infrastructure that's bleeding money unnecessarily. Our AWS bill is sitting at $4,500/month – and we know it shouldn't be anywhere near that. We need someone who can come in, audit the whole setup, and actually fix it. Not just give us a report that sits in a folder.



We've already been through a few candidates who talked a big game but couldn't execute. We're done with that. If you're the type who needs handholding or can't work independently, this isn't for you.





What You'll Actually Do

- Audit our entire AWS infrastructure and identify exactly where we're wasting money (we expect significant savings)

- Optimize our Kubernetes clusters – right-size nodes, fix resource requests/limits, implement autoscaling that actually works

- Implement cost controls: Reserved Instances, Savings Plans, spot instances where appropriate, and cleanup of orphaned resources

- Set up monitoring and alerts so costs don't creep back up without us knowing

- Document everything you do so the team can maintain it





Hard Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

- 3+ years hands-on Kubernetes experience in production environments – EKS specifically preferred

- Deep AWS knowledge: EC2, EKS, RDS, S3, CloudWatch, Cost Explorer, Trusted Advisor

- Proven track record of actually reducing AWS costs (be ready to share numbers/percentages)

- Strong scripting skills (Python, Bash) for automation

- Infrastructure as Code: Terraform or CloudFormation (Terraform preferred)

- Self-starter who can take ownership and execute without constant oversight





!!!!CRITICAL: This Role Requires Surgical Precision

This is production infrastructure running live systems. Think of this like surgery – one wrong move can take everything down.

- NO cowboy moves. You don't delete, modify, or remove anything without a clear plan first.

- Every change must be planned out, documented, and confirmed with the CEO before execution.

- Extreme attention to detail. You double-check and triple-check before touching anything.

- If you're not 100% sure what something does, you ask first. You don't assume.

- Methodical execution only. We value careful and correct over fast and reckless.





Strong Plus

- Experience with blockchain/Web3 infrastructure

- Karpenter, Cluster Autoscaler, or KEDA experience

-  AWS certifications (Solutions Architect, DevOps Engineer)

- Experience with FinOps tools (Kubecost, CloudHealth, 
)





What We Need In Your Application

Don't send a generic application. We will ignore it. Include:

- Specific examples of AWS cost optimization you've done – what was the setup, what did you change, what % did you save?

- Your Kubernetes experience – cluster sizes you've managed, scaling strategies you've implemented

- Your availability and timezone (we need someone who can overlap with US business hours for some calls)





Compensation & Structure

- $20-25/hour based on experience and proven results

- 20 hours/week to start – potential for more hours for the right person

- Fully remote

- Initial project: Comprehensive audit + implementation plan with clear cost reduction targets





If you're someone who can actually deliver results and not just talk about them – we want to hear from you. Show us what you've done.

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (DeFi and NFT Projects)
description:
About Energi

Energi (NRG) is a scalable and secure blockchain ecosystem, designed to power the next generation of Web3 applications, DeFi protocols, and NFT marketplaces. Built on a robust Proof of Stake (PoS) infrastructure, Energi combines Ethereum compatibility, on-chain governance, a self-funding treasury, and a Layer 2 masternode network to drive innovation in decentralized technology.

Our remote-first team spans the Americas, Europe, Africa, Asia, and Oceania, working together to push the boundaries of blockchain scalability and security. With a growing network of global contributors, we are committed to building a blockchain that is not only secure but also developer-friendly and highly scalable.

Energi is engineered to support millions of users, making it an ideal platform for high-performance dApps, NFT marketplaces, and decentralized finance solutions. Our ecosystem is designed for fast, cost-effective transactions with a focus on long-term sustainability.

By fostering collaboration, innovation, and a forward-thinking culture, Energi is redefining the Web3 landscape. Explore our vision and mission at 
.





WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU:

-Work flexible hours from anywhere as part of a globally distributed team driven by innovation and shared values.

-Directly shape the future of blockchain technology in NFT development.

-Enhance your skills and creativity with cutting-edge blockchain, smart contract, and Web3 technologies.

-Be part of an advanced blockchain ecosystem and contribute to building next-gen NFT platforms.

-Competitive pay structure in a 50/50 split of ETH and NRG tokens.



Front-End Role

JOB OVERVIEW:

We seek a Blockchain Full-Stack Engineer specializing in NFT platforms to drive the front-end development of our decentralized applications. You’ll create immersive Web3 experiences while integrating blockchain-based features like Metamask and smart contracts.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Work closely with UX designers to create seamless NFT marketplaces and dApps.

-Develop interactive front-end features integrating Web3.js and smart contracts.

-Optimize UI performance and ensure mobile responsiveness.

-Maintain existing applications and introduce new blockchain features.



ESSENTIAL REQUIREMENTS:

-3+ years of experience in front-end development.

-Proficient in React, Gatsby, and Web3 frameworks.

-Experience integrating blockchain wallets like Metamask.

-Strong analytical skills and attention to detail.

-Fluent English communicator with a passion for blockchain.



NICE TO HAVE:

-Experience with Web3, Infura, and The Graph.

-Familiarity with NFT metadata standards and ERC-721/ERC-1155.

-SEO optimization skills.



Back-End Role

JOB OVERVIEW:

We’re looking for a Blockchain Full-Stack Engineer to build the backend for NFT applications. You’ll be responsible for designing, maintaining, and optimizing APIs that connect blockchain smart contracts with scalable Web3 applications.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Develop secure APIs that interact with NFT smart contracts.

-Optimize backend infrastructure for high-traffic NFT transactions.

-Implement blockchain indexing solutions for NFT metadata retrieval.

-Write unit tests to ensure security and efficiency.



ESSENTIAL REQUIREMENTS:

-3+ years of back-end development experience.

-Proficiency in Golang, NodeJS, and GraphQL.

-Experience with blockchain data structures and decentralized storage.

-Passionate about blockchain innovation and fluent in English.



NICE TO HAVE:

-Knowledge of smart contract security best practices.

-Prior experience with NFT minting platforms.

-Remote work experience.



This role is not open to 3rd party organizations or agencies. Any candidates sent will be considered free of any charges



Energi is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, pregnancy, disability, age, veteran status, or other characteristics.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (After Effects) — AI, Instagram/TikTok
description:
JOB TITLE: Short-Form Video Editor (After Effects) — AI, Instagram/TikTok

SALARY: $1,100 USD/month

TYPE: Full-time (40 hours/week)

LOCATION: Remote (Philippines)

SCHEDULE: Async, with Vancouver overlap (PST) for feedback



---



THE MISSION



Prismiera is a luxury jewelry brand with a short-form video series already producing cinematic content on YouTube — mythology, history, goddess archetypes, and Dark Academia aesthetics.



We need someone to own the Instagram and TikTok side.



This is NOT repurposing YouTube content into different aspect ratios. This is building platform-native content that makes a woman feel powerful in under 20 seconds. You'll create original short-form edits and cinematic skits using AI-generated footage, voiceovers, and atmospheric visuals — designed from the ground up for how Instagram and TikTok audiences actually consume.



The other half of this role: you'll be working with our AI-generated personas who serve as the visual anchor across our short-form content. You'll generate, composite, integrate, and stylize AI character visuals into edits that feel striking and intentional, not gimmicky. If the idea of building a visual identity around an AI persona excites you, keep reading!



---



THE STYLE



The content mix you'll produce:



65% VIBE & SCENARIO — The kind of reel a woman sends to her group chat with no caption because the vid speaks for itself. 



25% CINEMATIC SKITS — High-end, visually stunning executions of viral formats and humor. The premise can be slightly unhinged or ironic, but the visuals never break brand/luxury canon. 



10% SENSORY / EXPERIMENTAL — Layered, fast, loop-optimized. Visual overload with mythological texture. The algorithmic wildcard.



YES: Aspirational. Lethal elegance. Fashion-edit energy. Dark femininity. Music-driven impact. Content that feels like a luxury car reel meets ancient mythology. Cinematic skits using our AI personas — high-production value, deadpan, surreal, or darkly ironic.



NO: CapCut presets. Generic motivational quote reels. Low-effort vlog-style acting. Slapstick comedy. Anything that looks like it was made in Canva. Anything that cheapens a demi-luxury product.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Create & Adapt: Produce original Instagram/TikTok-native content using AI-generated visuals, trending audio, and our brand's mythology. Some pieces you'll build from scratch. Others you'll adapt from assets in our YouTube production pipeline. Either way, you're not resizing — you're crafting content shaped for how each platform rewards engagement.



Cinematic Skits: Build short-form skits around our AI personas that use trending formats, dark humor, or deadpan irony — executed at a visual level that never drops below luxury. People share it for the joke, follow the page for the aesthetic.



AI Persona Integration: Composite and stylize our AI-generated characters into edits as a visual anchor. She's not a narrator in your content — she's the presence. The face the eye locks onto while mythology and music layers move around her.



AI Content Generation: You won't just receive AI assets — you'll create them. Using tools like Seedance 2.0 and Seedream5, you'll generate goddess visuals, atmospheric environments, and character footage that feed directly into your edits. You're both the director and the editor.



Music-Sync Editing: Your cuts, transitions, and visual reveals are married to the beat. You understand rhythm as a storytelling tool. Swells, drops, silence, impact — all intentional.



Platform Instinct: You understand what Instagram rewards vs. what TikTok rewards. You know what gets saved on IG. You know what gets looped on TikTok. You design for those behaviors, not just for visual quality.



Instagram Packaging: Beyond the Reel itself — you contribute to grid cohesion, caption strategy, and Story sequencing. The profile should make someone think "I want to be part of this" within 2 seconds of landing.



Volume at Speed: Once your templates and aesthetic are locked, your turnaround per piece should be significantly faster than building from zero. We expect high output.



---



CORE REQUIREMENTS



After Effects (Mandatory). Compositing, layering, motion graphics, light/shadow matching. This is your primary tool. You build visual experiences, not just cuts.



Premiere Pro. For project handoffs and consistency with the rest of the team.



AI Generation Fluency. You'll be using frontier AI tools daily — not just editing AI output, but generating it. You'll learn to prompt, iterate, select, and refine AI-generated visuals as a core part of your production workflow. We provide paid accounts for all tools (Seedance 2.0, Seedream, and whatever launches next). What we need is someone who treats these tools as creative instruments, not novelties.



The Aesthetic Eye. You instinctively know the difference between aspirational and try-hard. Between elegant and overproduced. Between powerful and loud. Your edits make people feel something before they consciously understand what they're looking at.



Music & Rhythm. You've made edits where the music drives the visuals — AMVs, fashion reels, phonk edits, fan edits, whatever. You understand pacing as a weapon. You know what "the drop" means and you know when NOT to use it.



Loop Thinking. You design edits that reward rewatching. The cut that lands on beat, the detail you only catch the second time, the seamless loop point. You think in circles, not lines.



Strong English. Daily async communication — clear, direct, professional.



Reliable & Coachable. You hit deadlines or warn early. You take direct feedback and iterate fast. You flag problems with options, not excuses.



---



BONUS SKILLS (Not Required, But We'll Notice)



- Color grading — pushing AI output and mixed footage into a consistent luxury palette

- Typography sense — text overlays that feel intentional and premium

- Sound design — SFX layering beyond just music (risers, hits, atmospheric texture)

- Carousel / static design for Instagram companion posts

- Understanding of Instagram analytics — saves, shares, completion rates, and what drives them

- Experience building visual identities for brands or personas on social media



---



WEEKLY OUTPUT



Ramp-up (first 2–3 weeks): 3–5 pieces as you learn the brand aesthetic, lock your AE templates, learn the AI generation tools, and calibrate with the team.



Steady state: 10–15 pieces per week across Instagram and TikTok — a mix of original productions and asset-based adaptations depending on the content calendar.



---



HOW THIS ROLE FITS



Other editors handle cinematic YouTube production and visual effects — you own social media. Same mythology, same brand, different platform behavior. Each editor has a distinct lane, and yours is how Prismiera looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



---



SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS



RAM: 16GB minimum (32GB preferred) + SSD

Reliable high-speed internet (upload speed matters)

Must run After Effects, Premiere Pro, and browser-based AI tools simultaneously



---



PAID TRIAL (Shortlisted Candidates)



Before any full-time commitment, we run a weekly paid trial. We provide real assets from our production pipeline, style references, and the AI persona visuals. You deliver content. Trial is compensated at $250 USD at the end of each week. If it's a mutual fit after 30 days, we transition to regular bi-weekly payments.



This protects both sides — you see whether the work fits your strengths, we see whether the output fits our brand.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



- Paid accounts for all frontier AI tools — Seedance 2.0, Seedream, and whatever launches next

- Creative ownership — you're defining how a luxury brand looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok from day one

- An AI persona to build around — not a hypothetical, an active visual identity you'll shape and evolve

- A role that evolves as the tools evolve — this job will look different in six months, and that's the point

- Clear briefs — asset libraries, mood references, and specific direction for every batch

- Direct feedback — specific, constructive notes on every edit

- A brand worth building — Prismiera launches soon. A second AI-native brand is incubating behind it. You're not joining a finished machine. You're helping build one.



---



COMPENSATION



$1,100 USD/month. Paid trial at $250 USD/week, transitioning to bi-weekly payments of $550 after 30 days.



---



OWNERSHIP & CONFIDENTIALITY



All outputs (edits, project files, prompts, generated assets, persona visuals) are Prismiera property and must remain confidential.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Do not send a generic cover letter.

Use 7 apply points or more when applying.



Subject line: PRISMIERA SOCIAL — [Your favorite anime]



Send the following (in this order):



1. The Vibe Test. Link to ONE edit you've made that is aspirational, aesthetic, or fashion-adjacent, or a skit that demonstrates platform-native virality instinct. Format doesn't matter. The feeling and execution does.



2. The Rhythm Test. Link to ONE edit where the music drives the visuals. Show us your beat-sync instinct. (Can overlap with #1 if one video demonstrates both.)



Portfolio link (optional). If you have a reel, channel, or portfolio beyond the two links above, drop it here.



3. The Creative Instinct Test (3–5 sentences total). You're given a 45-second cinematic video about a queen who poisoned her entire court, a folder of our AI Goddess visuals, and a dark atmospheric beat. Pitch two reworks: (A) a 15-second Instagram Reel designed to get saved — tell us your audio choice, pacing, and what the first 2 seconds look like; and (B) a 15-second cinematic skit that uses dark or deadpan humor without losing the luxury feel.



4. AI Experience (1–2 sentences). What is your experience level with generative AI tools? If none, say so — we'll evaluate the rest on its own merits.



5. Hardware. Your PC specs: CPU / GPU / RAM. Plus your internet upload speed.



6. Turnaround Estimate. Given existing footage, a music track, and an established AE template — how long would a 15–20 second piece take you?



7. The Rewrite. Rewrite this sentence to sound dark, powerful, and aspirational: "She is really cool and strong and she wins."

title: Video Editor and thumbnail/graphics creator for YouTube
description:
**Position:** YouTube Video Editor + Thumbnail Designer

**Type:** [Full-Time / Part-Time / Freelance /]

**Location:** [Remote / Hybrid ]

**Compensation: Based on experience level



We are looking for a high-level YouTube video editor, who understands how to turn raw footage into content that is engaging, polished, and built to perform on YouTube.



This role is not just about cutting clips together. We need someone who can shape a strong story, keep pacing tight, add the right B-roll and graphics, and package each video with a compelling thumbnail. You should be comfortable taking **horizontal footage** and turning it into a polished **long-form YouTube video**, then repurposing that same content into a **vertical short-form edit** for YouTube Shorts and other social platforms.



What You’ll Do:



* Edit **long-form YouTube videos** from raw horizontal footage

* Add **B-roll, music, sound design, text callouts, and graphics** to improve pacing and viewer retention

* Create clean, branded **motion graphics** and on-screen visual elements

* Turn long-form footage into **short-form vertical videos** optimized for YouTube Shorts

* Reframe and resize footage properly for both **16:9 horizontal** and **9:16 vertical** formats

* Design **high-converting YouTube thumbnails**

* Cut for strong **hooks, pacing, clarity, and engagement**

* Organize project files, footage, and exports in a clean and reliable workflow

* Collaborate on revisions and apply feedback quickly

* Maintain consistency with our brand voice, visual style, and content goals



Must-Have Skills



* Strong experience editing for **YouTube**, especially **long-form content**

* Ability to add **B-roll, graphics, captions, and visual storytelling elements**

* Experience creating **YouTube thumbnails**

* Ability to take **horizontal video footage** and create both:



  * a polished **long-form YouTube video**

  * a **vertical short-form version** for Shorts

* Strong instinct for **story structure, pacing, hooks, and retention**

* Experience with **Adobe Premiere Pro**

* Working knowledge of **After Effects** or similar motion graphics software

* Strong eye for composition, timing, and clean visual design

* Ability to meet deadlines and communicate clearly



 Nice-to-Have Skills



* Experience editing for creators, personal brands, or educational/lifestyle/real estate channels

* Understanding of what makes thumbnails clickable without feeling misleading

* Familiarity with YouTube performance metrics such as **audience retention, click-through rate, and watch time**

* Basic color correction and audio cleanup skills

* Ability to suggest stronger edit choices rather than only following instructions



What Success Looks Like



* Long-form videos feel engaging, polished, and professional

* Edits use B-roll and graphics intentionally, not just for filler

* Short-form clips are fast-paced, platform-native, and attention-grabbing

* Thumbnails are clean, bold, and built to drive clicks

* Turnaround is reliable and communication is easy

* Final content feels on-brand and ready to publish



 Software / Tools



Please be proficient in some or all of the following:



* Adobe Premiere Pro

* After Effects

* Photoshop and/or Canva

Opus One

* 
, Google Drive, Dropbox, or similar review/file-sharing tools



To Apply



Please send:



* Your **portfolio** with examples of:



  * 3 long-form YouTube edits

  * 3 short-form vertical edits

  * 3 thumbnails you created

* A short note about your experience editing for YouTube

* Your typical turnaround time

* Your rates or salary expectations

* The word **“YouTube Editor”** in your application subject line so we know you read the full post

title: Driver Support | Dispatch | Admin
description:
CareFlo USA Logistics



Dispatcher Support + Admin + Accounting Assistant (Remote)



About the Position

This role is the financial and paperwork and constant video chat to support driver.

CareFlo USA Logistics is looking for a reliable and organized person to support daily operations while the driver is on the road.



The owner will:

•   Drive the truck

•   Negotiate rates

•   Approve and book all loads



You will:

•   Search for loads

•   Handle paperwork

•   Manage accounting in Google Sheets

•   Keep the business organized



This position does not book loads.

The owner makes all final booking decisions.



???? Main Responsibilities



???? Load Searching (Training Provided)



You will:

•   Search for auto transport loads on load boards

•   Review pickup and delivery locations

•   Calculate rate per mile

•   Check total miles and route fit (I-10 strategy)

•   Send load options to the owner for approval

•   Keep load details organized in the tracking sheet



Paperwork & Document Management



You will:

•   Send carrier packets (W9, insurance, MC, etc.)

•   Save signed broker agreements

•   Maintain organized digital folders

•   Keep insurance certificates updated

•   Track rate confirmations and BOLs



Organization is critical.





???? Accounting (REQUIRED)



You must have an accounting background and QuickBooks Online experience Google Sheet.



You will:

•   Record all expenses (fuel, tolls, maintenance, etc.)

•   Upload and attach receipt photos

•   Categorize all transactions correctly

•   Generate weekly Profit & Loss reports



You will:

•   Submit signed BOL and rate confirmation to factoring company

•   Verify paperwork is complete

•   Track payment status

•   Follow up if payments are delayed

•   Record factoring fees properly in QuickBooks



Weekly Reporting



Every week you will provide:

•   Total revenue

•   Total expenses

•   Fuel cost summary

•   Net profit

•   Outstanding invoices

•   Any financial issues



Dispatch experience is NOT required.

We will train you on load searching.



This Position Is NOT For

•   Someone careless with numbers

•   Someone uncomfortable using QuickBooks online or Trucking office software.

•   Someone who ignores details

•   Someone who needs constant supervision

•   Someone who avoids responsibility



I would like all responses to this inquiry to be provided in a short video format.

This role is the financial and paperwork constant video chat to support driver.

title: -->>Web Developer – Build. Optimize. Innovate. – 20+ Benefits!<<--
description:
Job Overview:



We are looking for a skilled web developer with experience in modern JavaScript technologies (such as Node. js and React. js) to join our growing development team. This role will involve building high-performance web applications from the back end (server-side logic) to the front end (UI experience). The ideal candidate will have a solid understanding of both front-end and back-end technologies, a passion for clean code, and a drive to provide innovative web experiences.



Interested applicants may send their resume to 





Key Responsibilities:

Collaboration:

-Work closely with the development team to turn project requirements into high-quality web applications.

-Contribute to brainstorming and architectural discussions to ensure scalable, maintainable, and performant code.

-Participate in code reviews to ensure quality and share best practices with the team.



Web Application Development:

-Design, develop, and maintain responsive and high-performance web applications using React.js and Node.js.

-Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code across the full stack, following best practices and ensuring cross-browser -compatibility.

-Develop and integrate RESTful APIs, WebSockets, and third-party services to enhance application functionality.



Front-End Development:

-Build and maintain dynamic user interfaces using, with a focus on reusable components, state management (Redux, Context API), and efficient rendering.

-Implement responsive design and ensure the application performs well across devices and browsers.



Back-End Development:

-Build and maintain server-side logic, databases, and APIs.

-Work with relational and NoSQL databases (e.g., MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL).

-Integrate front-end applications with back-end systems and databases, ensuring smooth data flow and performance.



Optimization & Maintenance:

-Optimize application performance, identifying and fixing performance bottlenecks.

-Maintain high standards for application security and data integrity.

-Continuously monitor and improve existing applications.



Testing & Documentation:

-Write unit and integration tests to ensure the reliability and robustness of code.

-Document technical specifications, code, and APIs for internal teams and future development.



Required Skills & Qualifications:

-Proven experience in web development with expertise in Javascript frameworks and libraries such as React.js and Node.js.

-Strong understanding of JavaScript (ES6+) and modern JavaScript features.

-Experience with HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design principles.

-Proficiency with RESTful API design and integration.

-Experience using front-end state management libraries like Redux or Context API.

-Experience working with server-side technologies like Express.js (Node.js framework).

-Solid understanding of databases (relational and/or NoSQL databases such as MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL).

-Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to debug complex issues.

-Excellent communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with both technical and non-technical teams.



Why Join Us?

-Competitive salary and benefits package.

-Flexible working hours and remote work options.

-Opportunities for professional growth and learning.

-A collaborative and innovative work environment.

-Access to cutting-edge technologies and projects.

-A supportive team focused on work-life balance and personal development.



Work Schedule: 12:00mn to 8:30am PH Time



The company uses a time tracker and maintains a virtual office setup via Google Meet.



Virtual Office Setup: We ask tea
mbers to maintain a virtual office via Google Meet with cameras on during work hours. This helps us simulate an in-office environment, encourages collaboration, and ensures everyone is present and engaged throughout the day, even while working remotely.

Note: The company uses a time tracker to ensure productivity and accountability.

title: HighLevel Website & Funnel Builder Needed (Project-Based – $10/hr)

- Build clean, high-converting 1-page and multi-page websites inside GHL

- Customize templates, optimize for AI/GEO ranking, add chatbots, calendars, forms, etc.

- Make the sites look professional and convert well



All work is done inside my GoHighLevel account using snapshots/templates. I will provide the design brief, branding, and content. You just build clean, fast, and high-converting sites.



Compensation (Project-Based):

1-Page Website - $40 per site (avg 4 hours)

1. Link to 2–3 examples of full GHL websites you’ve built

3. Answer the question "why should I hire you?"



Only serious, skilled applicants will be considered.



Looking forward to seeing your work.

title: Remote Geospatial Image Analyst – Roof Measurement Quality Reviewer
description:
About RoofingAssist.AI



RoofingAssist.AI is a U.S.-based technology company that produces automated roof measurement and property intelligence reports for roofing contractors and property professionals.



Our software analyzes satellite and aerial imagery to measure roofs and estimate materials. Your job is to review the measurements and confirm they are accurate before reports are delivered to customers.



This is a detail-focused computer job, not customer service.



You will review aerial roof images and verify measurement accuracy using our software.



Daily tasks include:



• Viewing satellite and aerial imagery of homes

• Identifying roof features such as ridges, hips, valleys, and eaves

• Reviewing roof outlines drawn by the software

• Checking measurement accuracy

• Identifying roofing materials (asphalt, metal, tile, etc.)

• Approving or flagging reports

• Writing short notes when something appears incorrect



Requirements



We will train you. Roofing experience is not required.



However, applicants must have:



• Excellent attention to detail

• Strong written English

• Ability to follow instructions precisely

• Reliable internet connection (25 Mbps or higher)

• Desktop or laptop computer

• Quiet work environment

• Ability to learn technical software tools



Helpful experience:



• Architecture

• CAD

• Engineering

• GIS / mapping

• Construction

• Image annotation

• Quality assurance

• Drone imagery review



Application Instructions



Applicants must follow instructions.



In the first line of your application write:



“I pay attention to detail.”



Also include:



• Internet speed test screenshot

• Computer specifications

• Previous job experience



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.



Once trained:



Reviewer speed should be approximately:



8–12 reports per hour



Daily output:



60–90 reviews per day



Monthly:



1,200 – 1,600 reports

title: Administrative Operations Assistant
description:
Administrative Operations Assistant

Client Journey & Estimating Support

20 hrs/week | Long-Term Opportunity | $5–$8/hr DOE



TO APPLY: You must fill out our online application. Expect 20 to 30 minutes. Please review this whole job posting BEFORE you apply. Applicants who simply "apply" through onlineJobs.ph and do not fill out our application may not be followed up with.

LINK TO APPLICATION: 



ABOUT US:



The WaitStaff Team is a fast-growing U.S.-based event services company specializing in weddings and large-scale events across Oregon and Washington.



We provide professional service staff, including:

- Bartenders

- Servers

- Event Leads

- Rental coordination

- Logistical support



We work alongside caterers, venues, planners, and private clients to execute events smoothly and professionally.



Our workflow is structured and process-driven. An event typically moves through:

Client inquiry ? Estimate creation ? Retainer ? Revisions ? Vendor coordination ? Staffing ? Event execution ? Final billing adjustments.



In 2024, we experienced nearly 50% company growth, and we are anticipating a large expansion again this next year. We are building systems that allow us to scale efficiently — and we need a strong administrative partner to help support that growth.



We are not hiring for a short-term task role. We are building a long-term team.



----------------------------------------------------------------------



ABOUT THE ROLE:



You will work directly with our U.S.-based Event Manager as her administrative operations partner.

She handles client calls and gathers event information.



You will:

- Build and edit detailed estimates

- Clean up formatting and grammar

- Identify inconsistencies

- Ensure all quote information is complete

- Prepare documents so they are ready to send



This is not a “task follower” role.

We are looking for a THINKING ADMINISTRATOR who can take ownership.



If we present the following question:

“Here is the information. Can you please fix this quote?”



You should be able to:

- Identify missing details

- Correct grammar and formatting

- Improve clarity

- Make logical adjustments

- Leave organized notes when clarification is required

- Deliver a polished result ready for review



----------------------------------------------------------------------



TRAINING & ONBOARDING (First 2 Weeks)



We provide structured training during your first two weeks.



You will:

- Watch Loom training videos

- Learn our estimating system

- Learn our CRM (Pipedrive)

- Learn our staffing coordination platform (Ubeya)

- Draft SOPs from the Loom videos

- Organize documentation so you can reference it later



We expect you to actively document what you learn.



After 2 weeks, success means:

- You are creating quotes with little to no repeated questions

- You reference your SOPs before asking

- You organize processes so answers are easy to find

- You begin operating independently

- If you repeatedly ask the same questions after training, this role will not be a good fit.



----------------------------------------------------------------------



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES:



- Create and edit event estimates using our custom quoting tool

- Operate within Pipedrive CRM

- Assist with staffing coordination (Ubeya)

- Review documents for grammar, clarity, and formatting consistency

- Complete assigned tasks within 24 hours

- Return clear, organized notes when clarification is needed

- Draft and maintain internal SOP documentation

***As the role develops, you may eventually communicate with clients directly via
.



----------------------------------------------------------------------



IDEAL BACKGROUND



You must have:

- Clear verbal English

- Excellent written English (grammar must be strong)

- 2+ years administrative support experience

- Experience supporting a client through an entire journey (intake ? estimate ? revisions ? final billing)

- Ability to work independently

- Strong organizational thinking



Highly valued:

- Experience in construction administration

- (Proposal ? Estimate ? Retainer ? Change Orders ? Final Billing)

- CRM experience

- Estimating system experience

- Light automation experience

- Process improvement mindset

***Construction experience translates well because the workflow is very similar to event operations.



----------------------------------------------------------------------



PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS



You will be successful if:

- All tasks are completed within 24 hours

- Quotes are formatted cleanly and consistently

- Grammar errors are corrected before review

- Questions are efficient and organized

- You do not need repeated instruction

- You begin suggesting process improvements after understanding the system



We are looking for someone who operates at a 6–7 level of independent judgment and grows from there.



----------------------------------------------------------------------



WORK REQUIREMENTS:



- 20 hours per week

- Minimum 2–3 hours overlap with PST (U.S. West Coast time)

- High-speed reliable internet

- Backup internet and backup power

- Dual monitors required

- Quiet professional workspace



----------------------------------------------------------------------



COMPENSATION:



- $5–$8+ per hour (DOE)

- Hourly tracking and reporting

- Performance-based raises

- Long-term growth potential

- For high performers, this role can evolve into a Client Experience Manager position as the company grows.



----------------------------------------------------------------------



WHO THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR:



- Someone who needs step-by-step instructions every time

- Someone is uncomfortable correcting documents

- Someone who struggles with written English

- Someone who waits for tasks instead of anticipating needs



----------------------------------------------------------------------



TO APPLY: You must fill out our online application. Expect 20 to 30 minutes. Please review this whole job posting BEFORE you apply. Applicants who simply "apply" through online 
 and do not fill out our application may not be followed up with.

LINK TO APPLICATION:

title: Social Media Manager (Full-Time Virtual Assistant)
description:
Wellness Brand | Pharmacist-Led Company 



We are looking for a creative, proactive Social Media Manager to join our growing team full-time.



You’ll be working with a pharmacist and wellness educator who has built a large and trusted audience through education, podcasting, and social media.



Our company focuses on:

-Personalized health

-Supplements and wellness

-Functional medicine concepts

-Community education



We are also launching a new wellness community, and this role will be key in helping us nurture and grow that audience.



Our mission is to educate people about health, supplements, and personalized wellness through social media, video, and community engagement.



This role is perfect for someone who loves social media, understands engagement, and enjoys wellness content.

You’ll help us keep conversations alive, grow the community, and turn great content into multiple social media assets.



What You’ll Be Doing:

1. Community Engagement

-Respond to comments and messages on Instagram,
, and YouTube

-Engage with followers in a natural, thoughtful way

-Monitor conversations and flag important questions to the team

-Help nurture our audience and make them feel heard and supported



2. Social Media Management

-Post and schedule content across platforms

-Upload Reels, Shorts, and other video content

-Post Instagram Stories regularly

-Monitor performance and identify top-performing content



3. Content Repurposing

-Turn podcast clips into social media content

-Create short-form video clips for:

Instagram Reels

YouTube Shorts

TikTok-style videos



4. Light Video Editing

-Edit short videos using tools like CapCut or similar

-Add captions and light B-roll when needed

-Cut longer videos into short segments



5. Automation & Messaging

-Assist with ManyChat flows

-Help manage automated responses and keyword triggers

-Support simple lead capture campaigns



Experience with these tools is helpful but not required:

-Canva

-CapCut

-Instagram



-YouTube

title: E-Commerce Virtual Assistant (Product Research & Store Operations)
description:
About the Role



We are a growing startup e-commerce brand focused on AI Dropshipping, looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant from the Philippines to help us find winning products and build high-converting product pages.



This is a great opportunity to grow with an early-stage brand, learn valuable e-commerce skills, and earn performance-based bonuses as the business scales.



You’ll be working directly with the founder and helping push the business forward by researching products, building product pages, and assisting with store operations.



No advanced experience is required — training and tools will be provided.





Key Responsibilities



Product Research



Research potential winning products using platforms such as Kalodata, Pipi Ads, TikTok,
 Ads Library, AliExpress, and other research tools we provide

- Identify products with strong viral potential and demand

- Fill out structured product research templates with your findings

- Analyze competitors and pricing



Product Page Creation



- Use **AI tools** to generate product descriptions and marketing copy

- Create **high-quality product images** using AI and editing tools

- Organize product images and content for store upload



Shopify Store Management



- Upload products to **Shopify**

- Format product pages with clean layouts

- Add images, descriptions, variants, and pricing

- Ensure product pages look **professional and high converting**



General E-Commerce Support



- Organize files and product research data

- Suggest product ideas and improvements

- Assist with store updates and operational tasks





Tools You’ll Use

We will provide access and training for tools such as:



- Shopify

- Product research tools

- AI image generation tools

- AI copywriting tools

- Google Sheets

- Product research templates



Training will be provided for everything.





Ideal Candidate



We’re looking for someone who is:



- Detail-oriented and organized

- Curious about e-commerce and online business

- Able to follow systems and templates

- Reliable and consistent with communication

- Comfortable learning new tools quickly

- Proactive and willing to suggest ideas



Bonus (not required):



- Shopify experience

- Product research experience

- AI tools experience

- Basic design skills







Compensation



Because we are an early-stage startup, compensation includes both a base pay and performance incentives so you can grow with the company.



Base Pay



Competitive hourly or monthly rate based on experience.



Performance Incentives. We believe in you winning when the company wins.

Potential bonuses include:



- Performance bonuses for finding winning products

- Bonus for products that reach sales targets

- Opportunities for pay increases as the company grows



Essentially, if a product you help research becomes a winning product, you may receive a bonus



This allows you to benefit directly from the growth of the business.







Growth Opportunity



This role has strong long-term potential.



As the company grows, you may move into roles such as:



- Product Research Lead

- E-Commerce Operations Manager

- Ads Creative Researcher

- Store Manager



We want someone who is excited to build something long term, not just complete tasks.







Work Hours



Flexible hours available.

Part-time or full-time depending on availability.







How to Apply



Please send the following:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your previous experience (if any)

3. Why you are interested in e-commerce

4. Your expected monthly salary

5. Your internet speed

6. Your availability



Applicants who show initiative, attention to detail, and willingness to learn will be prioritized.

title: Property Management Lead (Buildium Required) – Remote | Full-Time
description:
Property Management Lead (Buildium Required) – Remote | Full-Time



U.S. Rental Portfolio | Long-Term Role



About Us



We are a U.S.-based real estate investment and property management company managing a growing rental portfolio. We operate with systems, KPIs, and clear accountability. We are seeking a Property Management Lead with hands-on Buildium experience to run day-to-day operations and help scale our property management infrastructure.



This is not an entry-level VA role. This is an operations leadership position.



Role Overview



The Property Management Lead will be responsible for **owning property operations inside? within Buildium, serving as the central point of coordination between tenants, vendors, leasing, and ownership. You will ensure data accuracy, timely execution, and operational efficiency across the portfolio.



If you have not actively used Buildium, this role will not be a fit.



Key Responsibilities

Buildium Operations (Core Responsibility)



Manage all properties inside Buildium (leases, tenants, units, vendors)



Create and track maintenance requests and work orders



Manage rent collection, delinquencies, and tenant ledgers



Run reports (rent roll, delinquency, maintenance, vacancy)



Ensure data accuracy and compliance within Buildium



Tenant & Leasing Management



Handle tenant communications (maintenance, billing, notices)



Coordinate move-ins, move-outs, and renewals



Track leasing pipeline and application status



Support Section 8 leasing where applicable



Maintenance & Vendor Coordination



Receive and triage maintenance requests



Assign work orders to vendors in Buildium



Track completion, invoices, and approvals



Follow up to ensure quality and timeliness



Reporting & Process Improvement



Deliver weekly operational reports to ownership



Track KPIs (vacancy, collections, response times)



Help improve and document SOPs



Identify inefficiencies and propose solutions



Required Qualifications (Non-Negotiable)



2+ years of hands-on Buildium experience



Property management or real estate operations background



Strong English communication skills (written & spoken)



Experience working with U.S.-based tenants and vendors



Highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented



Able to work independently and take ownership



Preferred (Nice to Have)



Section 8 / affordable housing experience



Experience managing 50+ units



SOP creation or team leadership experience



Familiarity with U.S. fair housing and compliance basics



Work Details



Remote / Work From Home



Full-Time (40 hours/week)



U.S. business hours (EST preferred)



Long-term role with advancement potential



Compensation



Competitive monthly salary (based on Buildium experience)



Performance-based bonuses



Growth path to Senior Operations / Portfolio Manager



How to Apply



Please include:



Your Buildium experience (years used, features handled)



Approximate number of units managed in Buildium



Types of properties managed (single-family, multifamily, Section 8, etc.)



A brief description of how you handle maintenance and tenant issues inside Buildium



Applications without Buildium experience will not be considered.

title: Video Editor for Long-Form Storytelling YouTube Channel !!!
description:
Skilled YouTube video editor needed who specializes in high-quality long-form ‘faceless’ storytelling videos.    (Intermediate / Expert Level, sorry no beginners.)  



This is not basic editing. Our videos rely on strong hooks, fun and fast-paced emotional storytelling along with some animation, with pacing that is engaging to keep viewers watching.  If you understand how to build curiosity in the first 15 seconds and maintain retention throughout the video, this job may be the perfect fit for you.   The Niche that you will be working in will be focused on Animals within the Cryptid or Cryptozoology niche (this has NOTHING to do with the Crypto money niche).



This will be a good ‘fit’ for you if you:

• Like the ability to work on your own at your own home or café.  

• Like the fact that you can work within your own Time Zone (PST/PhST/PHT).

• Like the fact that your stable, full-time monthly salary is paid reliably on-schedule via EasyPay coupled with Payoneer (the method of payment through OnlineJobs.ph) or possibly through 
.

• Like the fact that you can become eligible for our ‘13th-Month Payment’ after 90 days of employment (prorated based on your exact start date).

• Like the fact that this is a long-term role for someone who wants full-time, stable, remote work with a clear purpose and consistent hours.

• Like the fact that this is a flexible, output-based working environment.  As long as deadlines and quality are strictly met and communication is clear, we do not micromanage your daily hours.

• Have the understanding that Speed does not replace Quality. The final videos must still be high quality and polished, but yet must be done in a timely manner.

• Have the Drive and Ability to work under deadlines, manage projects independently, and communicate effectively with me.

• Have the Ability to craft narrative-driven content that keeps viewers engaged from the first 15 seconds to the final frame… then this is for you.

• and if you know that you have the ‘abilities’ and ‘creativity’ to complete these videos as requested… if someone would just give you the chance…   then this is for you.



I Will Provide:

• Full complete Scripts along with full Voiceover Narration of each of the Scripts.

• Five of my channel’s completed videos that you can study and see EXACTLY what is expected for your editing.   I have a specific "vibe" and editing rhythm, and I need someone who can study my existing content and replicate that style consistently going forward.   This will provide you with Clear direction on tone, pacing, ‘hook’ placements, images needed, desired visual style, and more.

• Feedback, respect, and encouragement as you complete your editing.  I fully respect the work that you are providing.



What You Will Do:

• Edit long-form faceless YouTube videos (10–16 minutes on average – it can be more, it can be less).

• Create very engaging visual hooks in the first 15 seconds with ongoing hooks throughout the videos.

• Ability to create movements and animation for the animated ‘Character’ that narrates throughout (Rigging is provided, you’ll be animating some arm, hand, leg, mouth and facial movements).  He is generally to the side of the screen as the story is being told/narrated.

• Create and Add simple animations, transitions, background changes, images, motion graphics, and sounds and sound effects throughout to enhance the provided story.   You will match visual pacing with the narration.

• Maintain viewer engagement throughout the entire video – from beginning to the final end.

• Able to interact with me with Responsive communication: Able to confirm receipt of scripts and voiceover narrations, able to ask clarifying questions, able to provide timely status updates, able to meet agreed-upon deadlines on a consistent basis, etc.



Editing Software examples (any of these is fine):

• Adobe Premiere Pro

• After Effects

• DaVinci Resolve

• Final Cut Pro

• (or equivalent)



Compensation:

• Type: Full-Time (40 Hours/Week).

• Location: Working Remotely (Philippines).

• Salary Range:  30,000 to 50,000 PHP per month (Negotiable based on portfolio quality, abilities/experience, timeliness of video delivery, and commitment to number of videos completed).   We can also discuss alternative preferences such as $XX per ‘Video’ or $XX per ‘Minute of Video’.   

• You will know your exact Compensation amount prior to Hiring.



How to Apply:

I receive a high volume of applications for the positions that I post. To ensure I’m reviewing candidates who possess the high attention to detail required for professional video editing, please follow these instructions perfectly.  Please do not just send a generic resume. To be considered, please include ALL of the following in your application:

1. • An introduction explaining your experience with long-form video editing.

2. • Send me your portfolio – include at least two or three (or more) long-form YouTube videos that YOU personally edited that will display your best abilities.   Don’t send me someone else’s work.  YouTube links or downloadable files preferred – preferably in the storytelling niche.

3. • Tell me about the video editing software you will be using and your experience level with it. 

4. • On a scale of 1 through 10 (with 10 being ‘Fluently), how would you rate yourself in communicating in English (both spoken and written)?

5. • Please Note:  Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a 3- to 4-minute ‘paid trial edit’ (I will pay for it.)   (Script & Voiceover will be provided.)

6. • Please confirm that you are not from an agency or a team.  Only Solo freelancers will be considered.   

7. • To make sure you’ve read this entire job post, write the word ‘Bigfoot’ at the beginning of your application.   Applications without this word will not be considered.



As a recap, I am looking for someone who understands how to turn a story into a powerful visual experience.  

 

I need a long-form YouTube editor who can deliver in the style that I’ve defined, both on-time and to a high standard. If you’re reliable, detail-oriented, and able to begin immediately, I want to hear from you.     



Thank you,  Wes

What success looks like (plain English)

title: Remote SDR – Outbound Sales Rep & Closer
description:
Title: Virtual Assistant – Sales Development Rep 

Type: Remote, offshore, full time (US Pacific hours overlap required)

Reports to: Sales Manager, Y Media Services



Mission:

Generate new advertising clients for a local marketing agency (print, digital, TV, direct mail) by prospecting local businesses, booking qualified meetings, and closing them into monthly marketing packages.



Key Responsibilities

Research and build targeted lists of local businesses (restaurants, home services, health/wellness, retail, professional services, etc.).



Execute a structured outbound cadence (calls,
, light social) to business owners and decision makers.



Set qualified appointments for marketing consultations and, where appropriate, run those consultations yourself via phone/video.



Conduct brief discovery: understand the business, their local marketing, and customer growth goals.



Present and explain Y Media’s advertising solutions (print, magazine, digital, TV, direct mail) using provided decks, rate sheets, and scripts.



Close new clients into clear packages (typically recurring monthly campaigns) following defined pricing and terms.



Follow up with all warm leads and no shows to re book and move them to a decision.



Keep the CRM fully updated: activities, notes, opportunity stages, deals closed.



Hit and exceed weekly/monthly KPIs for dials, conversations, appointments, and closed deals.



Daily Activities

Make a targeted number of outbound calls to new and existing leads each day.



Send personalized follow up and nurture
s using templates and your own wording.



Run short discovery/closing calls for interested prospects and present offers.



Confirm upcoming appointments with the CEO or yourself (depending on the process).



Log all work in the CRM and prepare simple daily and weekly performance reports.



Requirements

1–2+ years' experience in outbound sales, SDR, appointment setting, or closing (phone/Zoom).



Strong spoken and written English with a confident, friendly phone presence.



Comfortable handling objections and asking for the sale in a professional, respectful way.



Experience using CRM and online tools (e.g., pipeline tracking,
, calendar).



Ability to follow scripts and processes while sounding natural and adapting to each prospect.



Reliable internet connection, headset, and quiet working environment.



Self?motivated, organized, and able to manage your time and pipeline with minimal supervision.



Personality & Work Style

Hungry and results driven; enjoys seeing numbers and commissions grow.



Resilient and persistent with outbound calling and follow up.



Coachable, open to call reviews and feedback, willing to practice and improve.



Honest, reliable, and interested in a long term role with growing responsibility.



Compensation

Base: Lower fixed base (e.g., in the ~$500–$600/month range, depending on experience).



Commission: Tiered commission on every new client you close, with higher commission rates as you close more deals in a month.



Upside: Realistic total monthly earnings can reach around ~$1,200+ for consistent performance, with no cap on commission.



(Exact numbers and tiers will be shared during the interview and in the contract.)



How to Apply

Send your CV or a short voice recording (30–60 seconds) introducing yourself and sharing your outbound sales experience. In the subject of your application, please include YM575



Include a brief note on your past results (e.g., appointments booked/month, deals closed/month) and your available working hours in Pacific Time.

title: YouTube Thumbnail & Packaging Designer
description:
Are you obsessed with what makes people click?



Do you study YouTube thumbnails, title combinations, and packaging strategy like it’s a sport? Do you know the difference between a thumbnail that looks nice and a thumbnail that actually performs?



We’re looking for a strategic, honest, and highly skilled YouTube Thumbnail & Packaging Designer to help us increase click-through rate, strengthen our visual positioning, and package our content in a way that drives growth.

This is not a basic design role. This is a YouTube growth role through visual packaging.





Role Summary:

You will be responsible for creating high-converting YouTube thumbnails for our long-form content and podcast episodes, while also contributing to the overall packaging strategy through title suggestions, A/B testing ideas, and performance-minded creative direction.



Right now, the role supports approximately:

6 thumbnails per month for our core YouTube channel



Within the next 60 days, this is expected to expand to:

10–11 thumbnails per month as our rebranded podcast launches (monthly pay will increase at this point)



This role is ideal for someone who understands that thumbnails are not “graphics.” They are one of the biggest levers for visibility and growth.





What You’ll Be Responsible For:



1. Designing thumbnails for YouTube videos on a recurring monthly cadence

2. Creating 2–3 concept directions per video

3. Helping narrow down the strongest concept based on strategy, not preference alone

4. Creating A/B test variations when needed

5. Collaborating on the relationship between thumbnail + title

6. Suggesting stronger title angles or packaging ideas when appropriate

7. Giving honest feedback if a concept is unlikely to perform

8. Maintaining brand consistency while still making the video feel clickable, modern, and competitive





What We’re Looking For:



You are not just a designer. You are someone who understands:

- click psychology

- curiosity gaps

- visual hierarchy

- facial expression / composition strategy

- title-thumbnail synergy

- the difference between aesthetic and performance





You should be able to:

- take a rough video concept and turn it into multiple strong packaging directions

- build on our ideas, not just wait for exact instructions

- tell us when our original direction may not be the best performer

- think like a strategist, not an order taker





Must-Haves:

- Strong portfolio of YouTube thumbnails

- Clear understanding of YouTube packaging

- Ability to create multiple concepts for one video

- Comfort with A/B testing variations

- Strong instincts for modern, high-performing design

- Ability to work fast without sacrificing strategic thinking

- Comfortable receiving feedback and refining based on performance goals





Brand + Style Notes:

Our brand has a luxe, polished, feminine edge, but performance comes first.



We are looking for thumbnails that find the sweet spot between:

clickable and strategic

elevated and on-brand





That means:

not overly soft

not generic “face + text” thumbnails

not overly minimal to the point of losing intrigue

not gimmicky, cluttered, or off-brand





We want thumbnails that:

- feel creative and tailored to the specific video

- use strong packaging instincts

- maintain some recurring consistency through fonts, tones, and overall visual identity

- still evolve based on the concept of each video



Here's our channel: 

We'd like to keep shock/clickable factor while making things on brand like the attached examples from this channel: 



Workflow Expectations:

- Attend the first creative tea
eting of each month

- Participate in the creative team chat for title/thumbnail discussions

- Be able to deliver concepts on deadline

- Communicate early if blocked

- Be open to collaborative refinement and testing

- The second creative tea
eting each month may be attended as needed depending on launches, campaigns, or testing priorities.





Growth Opportunity:

title: WordPress Developer - Bulk Site Setup - Gig Work
description:
Seeking a WordPress developer to set up 20 WordPress sites in a consistent and standardised manner over three weeks.  Site topics and content will vary with each site having its own purpose, but the main structure will be consistent across all sites. 



WHAT I'LL DO:

Install 20 copies of Wordpress on a VPS


 login and other details

Provide a written brief for each site outlining what it does, who its customers are, how it advertises, how it generates revenue, its mission and purpose, etc.  



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

Review site brief

Log into a new installation

Configure basic settings

Install and configure system/management/SEO plugins (the backbone plugins that will be the same for all sites)

Select and install site-specific plugins based on the brief

Select, install, and configure a theme as per brief

Set up basic pages, blog posts, etc with placeholder content as per brief

Deliver functional but unpolished sites (first drafts)

Complete one round of revisions if required



EXPECTED HOURS: 4-8 hours per site

RATE: $5/hr ($20-40 per site)



EXAMPLES OF SITES:

Online cookie shop (delivery)

Contractor listing directory

Bicycle parts shop

Local news site

Sports news site

Photography (framed/unframed print sales via print-on-demand)



REQUIREMENTS:

WordPress installation and configuration experience

Ability to work quickly without being distracted by perfection (first draft target: 4 hours per site)

Ability to quickly find and configure suitable plugins and themes based on site requirements

Comfortable with a repetitive task



WORKFLOW:

Week 1: Set up first three sites, decide on the backbone system, dial in the process

Weeks 2-3: Deploy remaining sites, target six sites per week



Each week your sites will be assigned at 6am Monday, first drafts due 10am Thursday, revisions due by 5pm Friday.  

In the first week you can spend eight hours per site i.e. one site Monday, one Tues, one Wed, deliver drafts Thurs AM, revise Thurs PM/Friday, deliver finals Friday PM).

Weeks 2 and 3 the target is six sites per week i.e. two sites Monday, two Tues, two Wed, deliver drafts Thurs AM, revise Thurs PM/Friday, deliver finals Friday PM.



TO APPLY:

Brief WordPress experience summary

Short summary in your own words of the Wordpress setup process as it applies to this role

Confirm your understanding of the timeline and delivery schedule

title: Systems & Microsoft 365 (Office 365) Administrator — SharePoint Expert
description:
About the role

We’re looking for a hands-on Systems & Microsoft 365 Administrator who’s an expert across the Microsoft 365 stack—especially SharePoint Online—to own day-to-day administration, security, governance, and continuous improvement for business environments.

You’ll be the go-to person for designing, maintaining, and optimising Microsoft 365 tenants, supporting users, and ensuring best-practice configuration across collaboration, identity, security, and device management.

Key responsibilities

Administer and optimise Microsoft 365 (tenant configuration, licensing, service health, change management)

Lead SharePoint Online administration: site architecture, permissions, governance, hub sites, document management, retention, sharing controls

Manage Teams and Exchange Online (policies, mail flow basics, groups, shared mailboxes, Teams governance)

Support and administer OneDrive and collaboration/sharing settings

Implement and manage Entra ID (Azure AD): users, groups, conditional access, MFA, SSO basics

Manage Intune (Microsoft Endpoint Manager): device compliance, app deployment, policies (nice to have if strong)

Security & compliance: baseline hardening, audit logs, DLP/retention (as applicable), secure access controls

Troubleshoot escalations (identity, sync, permissions, SharePoint/Teams issues) and provide clear user support

Document standards, SOPs, and configurations; improve processes and governance

Required experience / skills

Strong, proven experience as a Microsoft 365 / Office 365 Administrator

Deep expertise in SharePoint Online administration (permissions, structure, governance, lifecycle)

Solid knowledge across Teams, Exchange Online, OneDrive

Strong competency with Entra ID (Azure AD), MFA, Conditional Access

Confident troubleshooting skills and ability to explain solutions clearly to non-technical users

Experience working in MSP or multi-client environments (highly regarded)

Great documentation habits and a security-first mindset

Nice to have

Intune hands-on experience (device management, compliance policies)

PowerShell scripting for M365 administration/automation

Microsoft security/compliance tooling exposure (Purview, Defender for Office 365, etc.)

Relevant Microsoft certifications (e.g., MS-102, SC-300)

What we offer

A role with real ownership and impact across modern workplace environments

Supportive, practical team that values clear process and good outcomes

Flexible arrangements for the right person

title: Part-Time Acquisition Manager (Wholesale Closer + Comps) – Remote (Wed/Thu, $5hr, $20 bonues, commission)
description:
Company: Citrus Lane Rentals

Work Type: Part-time, remote



Schedule

 • Starting schedule: Wednesdays and Thursdays

 • Hours: 2 hours per day (4 hours/week)

 • Calling US sellers (must be comfortable speaking on the phone)

 • Additional hours may be added after a probationary review



Pay

 • $5/hour base

 • $20 per signed contract

 • Commission: % of the assignment fee (paid on closed/collected deals)



Job Overview



We are looking for a closing-focused Acquisition Manager to call motivated seller leads, run comps, present offers, negotiate, and get purchase contracts signed for our real estate wholesaling business.



What You Will Do

 • Call warm/hot seller leads and follow up consistently

 • Qualify sellers: motivation, timeline, condition, price

 • Run property comps (market value) to support offer pricing

 • Present offers clearly and professionally

 • Negotiate and handle objections

 • Get purchase contracts signed (DocuSign or similar)

 • Update notes and lead statuses in our tracking system

 • Coordinate handoff after signing (next steps with the team)



Required Skills

 • Strong English (spoken + written)

 • Confident on the phone (sales/closing experience)

 • Must know how to comp properties (sold comps, adjust for beds/baths/sqft, condition, days on market)

 • Able to use tools like Redfin/Zillow/Realtor (PropStream or similar is a plus)

 • Reliable and consistent every Wed/Thu

 • Organized follow-ups and clean notes

 • Stable internet, headset, quiet workspace



Preferred (Nice to Have)

 • Real estate wholesaling acquisitions experience

 • Experience calling US-based sellers



How to Apply (Required)



Send your application by
 to: Vladimir Ignacio (Operations Manager)





Include ALL of the following:

 1. Your experience (2–5 sentences)

 2. Your time zone + confirmation you can work Wed/Thu consistently

 3. Your equipment (internet speed + headset)

 4. Voice sample link (preferred)

 5. Comp Test (Required):

Comp this property: 15812 Starlite St, Clermont, FL 34714

Include:



 • Your step-by-step comp process (5–8 bullets)

 • At least 3 SOLD comps (0.5–1 mile if possible, similar beds/baths/sqft, sold within 6–12 months)

 • For each comp: address, sold price, sold date, beds/baths, sqft, link/source

 • Your final value range + best number, and 2–5 sentences why



 6. Objection question: How do you respond when a seller says “Your offer is too low”?



Applications missing any required items will not be considered.

title: Social Media & Growth Specialist - IPTV/Media Player App
description:
Summary

Social Media & Growth Specialist — OrbixPlay (Premium IPTV/Media Player App)

We are OrbixPlay, a premium multi-platform media player for Smart TVs, Fire TV, Android, and mobile devices. Our app is technically superior to competitors like TiviMate and IPTV Smarters Pro — faster, more stable, better UI — but we have near-zero marketing presence. We need someone to execute an aggressive 30-day content and community growth plan to build brand awareness and drive downloads.

This is NOT a "post pretty pictures" role. You will be creating screen-recording-based TikTok/Reels, seeding in Reddit and
 communities, managing influencer outreach, and tracking KPIs weekly. You will receive a detailed 30-day battle plan with daily actions, scripts, and targets.

WEEKLY DELIVERABLES:



Create and publish 7 short-form videos/week (TikTok, Reels, Shorts). Format: screen recordings of the app (we provide raw footage) + voiceover or text overlay + viral subtitles using CapCut. NO AI avatars — real screen recordings only.

Seed 2-3 organic posts/week on Reddit (r/IPTV, r/FireTV, r/AndroidTV, r/cordcutters). Authentic tone only — never promotional.

Engage daily in 5-10 relevant Reddit threads and
 groups.

Manage and promote our Fire TV Downloader code across all channels.

Identify and outreach 3-5 micro-influencers/month in the IPTV/cord-cutting niche.

Weekly performance report with metrics: views, engagement, clicks, downloads.



MUST-HAVE:

— Proven TikTok/Reels management experience for tech/app products (share portfolio)

— Deep understanding of IPTV, cord-cutting, Fire TV, Android TV ecosystem

— Fluent English (Italian is a strong plus)

— Reddit community experience (you understand the culture, you don't spam)

— CapCut proficiency for short-form video editing

— Self-starter who executes without hand-holding

WE PROVIDE:

— Detailed 30-day content battle plan with daily actions and KPI targets

— Raw screen recordings of the app (2-3/week)

— Access to the app on all platforms

— Direct access to the founder for weekly syncs

— Budget for micro-influencer collaborations ($100-200/month)

COMPENSATION:

— $7-12/hr, 15-20 hrs/week (~$500-800/month)

— Performance bonus: +$200 at 5K downloads, +$500 at 20K

— Initial 30-day trial, then monthly renewal

— Contract-to-hire opportunity (could become full-time)

HOW TO APPLY — REQUIRED (proposals without these will be ignored):



Links to 2-3 TikTok/Reels accounts you've managed (preferably tech niche)

Briefly explain: What is IPTV and why would someone use a media player like OrbixPlay instead of a built-in TV app? (This filters out people who don't know the space)

Your Reddit username

A 60-second sample video concept for OrbixPlay (script outline, not finished video)



Red flags: Generic "I can grow your social media" proposals. No IPTV knowledge. AI avatar video strategies.

title: Lead Creative Artist & Illustrator (Patriotic & Military Apparel)
description:
About Frontline Apparel



Frontline Apparel is not just a clothing brand; we are a tribute to the men and women who serve the United States. We design premium gear for the U.S. Marine Corps, Navy, Army, FBI, and Navy SEALs. Our mission is to provide service members and their families, the proud moms, dads, and spouses, with apparel that captures the grit, honor, and deep-seated patriotism of the American spirit.



The Role



We are looking for a versatile Graphic Designer / Illustrator who can move beyond "simple collegiate" designs. We don't want basic text in a circle. We need high-impact, custom illustrations that a Navy SEAL would be proud to wear and a "Marine Mom" would wear with tears of pride.



You must be able to capture the American Military Culture: the sacrifice, the brotherhood, and the fierce pride of the family dynamic.



Key Responsibilities



• Custom Illustration: Create original, hand-drawn, or digital illustrations (crests, military hardware, symbolic eagles, etc.).



• Versatile Styling: Switch between "gritty/tactical" styles for operators and "heartfelt/proud" styles for family members.



• Typography: Expertly integrate bold, impactful lettering that complements the artwork. • Brand Alignment: Study our current catalog at 
 to ensure all new designs elevate our existing aesthetic. Also researching current camo patterns, symbols, logos etc.



• Print-Ready Production: Prepare files for high-quality screen printing and DTG (Direct to Garment).



Requirements (Must-Haves)



• A "Patriotic" Eye: Even if you aren't American, you must have a deep understanding (or a willingness to intensely research) U.S. military culture, symbols, and the "Blue Collar/Patriot" mentality.



• Elite Drawing Skills: Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop is a given, but your ability to draw/sketch original concepts is what will set you apart.



• Attention to Detail: You know the difference between an Army rank and a Navy rank. You understand that symbols matter.



• Portfolio: A link to your portfolio is mandatory. We want to see complex illustrations, not just logos.



• Include a 1-minute Loom video introducing yourself and explaining your experience with gritty/tactical art styles.



Why Join Us?



• Consistent, long-term work with a respected American brand.



• Creative freedom to bring your own artistic "edge" to our products.

title: Travel Sales Consultant
description:
Job description

About Us:



Fayyaz Travels is a dynamic and rapidly growing travel company based in the vibrant city of Singapore. Our commitment to providing flexible and affordable travel services has made us a trusted name in the industry. We specialize in outbound and inbound tours, business travel, ticket bookings, hotel reservations, and creating unforgettable travel experiences for our clients.



Job Description:



We are seeking a dynamic and results-oriented individual to join our team as a Sales-focused Travel Consultant. The ideal candidate will possess exceptional interpersonal skills, a knack for building rapport with clients, and a proven ability to drive sales in a fast-paced environment. As a Travel Consultant, you will be responsible for providing personalized travel services, creating unforgettable experiences for our clients, and maximizing revenue through effective sales techniques.



Job Responsibilities:



Client Relationship Management: Build strong relationships with clients by understanding their travel preferences, needs, and budget constraints. Communicate with clients via phone,
, and online meetings to provide personalized travel recommendations and address any inquiries or concerns. Maintain regular contact with clients to keep them informed of travel deals, promotions, and updates.



Sales and Revenue Generation: Utilize exceptional sales skills to promote and sell a wide range of travel products and services, including flights, hotels, cruises, tours, and travel insurance. Meet and exceed sales targets by actively identifying opportunities to upsell and cross-sell additional services. Negotiate prices and terms with suppliers to secure the best deals for clients while maximizing profitability for the agency.



Product Knowledge and Expertise: Stay up to date on the latest travel trends, destinations, and industry developments. Continuously expand knowledge of various travel products, including accommodations, transportation options, and tour packages. Tailor travel recommendations to match the unique preferences and interests of each client.



Customer Service Excellence: Provide exceptional customer service throughout the entire travel booking process, from initial inquiry to post-trip follow-up. Handle any issues or complaints promptly and professionally, striving to exceed client expectations and ensure complete satisfaction. Anticipate potential problems or challenges and proactively offer solutions to mitigate risks and enhance the overall customer experience.



Qualifications:



Proven track record of success in a sales-driven role, preferably within the travel industry.



Exceptional interpersonal skills with the ability to engage clients, build trust, and establish long-term relationships.



Strong communication skills, both verbal and written, with a keen attention to detail.



Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and effectively manage multiple priorities simultaneously.



Passion for travel and a genuine desire to create unforgettable experiences for clients.



Requirements:



Poly-holder/Diploma in Tourism or Hospitality Management are welcome to apply.



4+ years of experience in a similar role, with a proven track record.



Advanced Amadeus knowledge and experience are desirable.



In-depth knowledge of holiday package curation processes and industry best practices.



Strong command of English (mandatory), Mandarin (preferred), and additional languages are a plus.



Excellent communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills.



Proven ability to work independently and think creatively.



Proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets for data management.

title: Mindbody (MBO) Technical Admin – Part Time (Remote)
description:
