title: Videographer
description:
ABOUT HONCHO



Honcho is a platform that helps photographers deliver photos instantly at events. Guests can scan a QR code, upload a selfie, and use AI-powered face recognition to quickly find the photos they appear in.



Our customers include brands, organisers, and photographers covering weddings, corporate activations, sports events, marathons, and headshot booths around the world.



We’re looking for a videographer to capture and produce short-form social media videos (Reels, TikTok, Shorts) that showcase real photographers and workflows.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



You’ll help turn real photography workflows into engaging social media content.



Your responsibilities will include:



• Capturing or sourcing video footage of photography workflows, setups, and demonstrations (either filming simple clips yourself or coordinating with photographers and users to obtain footage)

• Editing short-form videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

• Creating engaging hooks, captions, and overlays for videos

• Repurposing content across multiple platforms

• Posting and scheduling content across social media channels

• Turning raw footage into 3–5 social media posts per week

• Creating occasional carousel or photo posts

• Assisting with creator / influencer outreach

• Monitoring performance and suggesting improvements



Most content will focus on:



• Event photography workflows

• Instant photo delivery

• Headshot booth setups

• Real-world photography demonstrations



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



You’re a great fit if you:



• Have experience creating short-form video content from start to finish (capture ? edit ? publish)

• Comfortable capturing simple video clips or sourcing footage from users and creators to turn into engaging short-form content

• Have strong skills editing Reels / TikTok / Shorts

• Know how to create engaging hooks in the first few seconds

• Are comfortable adding captions, overlays, and visual storytelling

• Have strong written English for captions and titles

• Are proactive and curious about content ideas



Bonus if you:



• Are familiar with photography workflows

• Have experience growing social media accounts

• Have worked with creators or influencers

title: Remote Social Media Recruiter (TikTok / Streaming Talent) – Hourly + Bonuses
description:
We are a fast-growing online streaming agency looking for 4 motivated recruiters from the Philippines to help us find new streaming talent.



Your job will be to search for and connect with people on social media who may be interested in becoming live streamers and help guide them through our onboarding process.



This is a fully remote position with flexible hours, ideal for someone who is comfortable using social media and enjoys talking to new people online.



Position Details

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Hours: Part-time or Full-time available

Pay: $5 per hour



Performance Bonuses



$5 bonus for every person you recruit who reaches Level 2 within their first month



$10 bonus if that same streamer reaches Level 5 within 3 months



This means strong recruiters can earn significant additional income through bonuses.



Your Responsibilities



Search for potential streamers on platforms such as TikTok, Instagram, Bigo, Twitch, and other social media platforms



Send messages and connect with potential streamers



Explain our agency opportunity and answer basic questions



Guide interested creators through the onboarding process



Track people you recruit and follow up with them



Requirements



Strong English communication skills



Comfortable using social media platforms like TikTok, Instagram, and similar apps



Confident messaging new people online



Self-motivated and reliable



Organized and able to track your outreach



Bonus Skills (Not Required)



Experience in recruiting, social media outreach, or sales



Familiar with live streaming platforms



Why Work With Us



Work from home



Flexible schedule



Performance bonuses



Opportunity to grow with a fast-growing agency



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:



A short introduction about yourself



Your experience using social media platforms



Any experience you have with recruiting, sales, or outreach



A short voice recording introducing yourself in English (1–2 minutes)



We are looking for motivated people who are comfortable reaching out to many people each day and are excited to help grow our agency.



To confirm you read the full job post, please include the word “STREAM” at the start of your application.

title: Full-Time Credit Repair Operations Admin / Client Success Manager
description:
We are a fast-growing credit repair and funding company looking for a full-time team member who understands credit repair, disputes, client communication, Zoho CRM, operations, and lead follow-up. This person must be organized, proactive, dependable, and comfortable helping with both backend operations and occasional sales/cold calling when needed.



This is not just a basic admin role. We need someone who understands how to help manage a fast-growing credit repair and funding business, support clients, assist with disputes, help with follow-up, and at times assist with sales, lead follow-up, and cold calling when needed.



The ideal person is someone who can wear multiple hats, stay organized under pressure, communicate well in English, and help us keep the business running smoothly as new leads and clients come in daily.



This role is full-time



We are looking for someone who can work with us full-time, long-term, and grow with the company.



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who:



Has experience in the credit repair industry



Understands how to read and review consumer credit reports



Knows how to assist with credit disputes



Understands negative items such as:



collections



charge-offs



late payments



repossessions



evictions



bankruptcies



hard inquiries



outdated personal information



Has experience using Zoho CRM



Can manage client communication and updates



Can follow up with leads through calls, SMS, and



Is comfortable doing cold calling or sales follow-up when needed



Is highly organized and can help improve systems and workflow



Can assist with team coordination, hiring support, and operational tasks



Has strong English speaking and writing skills



Is proactive and does not need to be micromanaged



Main Responsibilities



Your responsibilities may include:



Credit Repair / Client Support



Assist with reviewing client credit reports



Help prepare and organize dispute information



Support the dispute process and client file management



Track client progress and ensure files are updated properly



Follow up with clients regarding required documents, updates, and next steps



Help keep client accounts organized and moving forward



CRM / Operations



Manage and update Zoho CRM



Keep lead and client records organized and accurate



Track communication, appointments, notes, and follow-ups



Help improve internal systems and operational workflow



Help make sure no leads or clients fall through the cracks



Support onboarding for new clients



Lead Follow-Up / Sales Support



Follow up with inbound leads quickly



Call warm leads who submitted information through ads or forms



Assist with appointment setting and confirmations



Help re-engage missed leads and no-shows



Occasionally assist with cold calling



Support basic sales conversations and move prospects toward booking or enrolling



Admin / Team Support



Help manage day-to-day admin tasks



Assist with team coordination



Support hiring-related tasks when needed



Help keep projects, tasks, and communication organized



Assist leadership with operational support as the company grows



Required Skills



To qualify, you should have experience with most of the following:



Credit repair experience



Dispute process knowledge



Zoho CRM experience



Strong communication skills



Customer service experience



Sales or lead follow-up experience



Cold calling confidence



Strong organization and attention to detail



Ability to multitask



Ability to follow SOPs and improve workflows



Reliable internet and quiet work environment







++++++++.Bonus If You Have ++++++++++++



These are a plus, but not required:



Experience in business funding or personal funding



Experience in appointment setting



Experience managing virtual teams



Experience hiring or assisting with recruitment



Experience with SMS/email follow-up systems



Experience with automation tools and AI tools



Experience in a fast-paced agency or service-based business

title: Bookkeeper / Accounting Operations Coordinator (Canadian CPA Firm)
description:
This is a hands-on bookkeeping role with added responsibility for client file coordination, reconciliations, and workflow support. We are not looking for a general virtual assistant.



About Us

Novack CPA is a growing Canadian CPA firm serving healthcare professionals, incorporated professionals, entrepreneurs, and owner-managed businesses. We provide bookkeeping, financial reporting, tax compliance, and advisory support across multiple client files.



Role Overview

We are looking for a strong, detail-oriented bookkeeper who can also help keep client files organized and moving. This role combines bookkeeping, reconciliations, document follow-up, and workflow support in a multi-client accounting firm environment.



Key Responsibilities



Perform bookkeeping for multiple clients using QuickBooks Online and other cloud tools



Categorize transactions and maintain accurate books



Prepare bank, credit card, loan, and other account reconciliations



Assist with accounts payable and accounts receivable tracking



Support payroll administration and remittance tracking



Follow up with clients for missing records and supporting documents



Maintain workflow trackers, task lists, and file status updates



Organize supporting documents for month-end, year-end, and tax preparation



Assist with bookkeeping cleanup projects



Flag unusual transactions, discrepancies, and missing information for review



Help maintain organized digital files and consistent documentation



Requirements



Minimum 3 years of bookkeeping or accounting support experience



Strong QuickBooks Online experience



Strong reconciliation skills



Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills



Excellent written and spoken English



Experience working with multiple clients or multiple entities



Highly organized and detail-oriented



Reliable internet connection and backup setup



Nice to Have



Experience working for an accounting firm or bookkeeping firm



Experience with professional services clients



Familiarity with Dext, Hubdoc, Wagepoint, Karbon, or similar tools



Experience with month-end close support and year-end working papers



Important Notes



This is a support role for a Canadian CPA firm



You will not be expected to provide tax advice or finalize tax returns independently



Accuracy, communication, reliability, and organization are critical



How to Apply

Please include:



Your resume



A short summary of your bookkeeping experience



The accounting software you have used



Your QuickBooks Online experience level



Your Excel skill level



A brief example of a difficult reconciliation or cleanup project you handled



Your required monthly compensation



Your internet speed and backup internet/power setup



Please include the phrase “Reconciliations first” at the top of your application.
